snippet.title: Godhuli Sanjhaima - Bishwo Dong & Sumina Lo | Abhi, Anita. Tsering, Pasang | New Tamang Selo Song
snippet.description:
Aanbhi Production Presents:
The official music video for "Godhuli Sanjhaima" featuring the beautiful voices of Bishwo Dong and Sumina Lo.

If you loved the video, please don't forget to Like, Share, Comment, and Subscribe to our channel for more amazing music videos!

🎶 Audio Credits:
Song: Godhuli Sanjhaima
Singers: Bishwo Dong & Sumina Lo
Lyrics: Kumar Syangba
Music: Joglal Lama
Arrange: Norbu Sherpa
Mix: Dipesh Pradhan
Studio: Arpan Studio

🎬 Video Credits:
Cast: Abhi Lama, Anita Gole, Tshering Lama, Pasang Doma Pakhrin
Direction: Abhi Lama
Cinematography: Jenish Tamang
DOP / Edit / Color: Surya Lama
Choreography: Bikash Aryal & Saroj Kunwar
Dance Studio: Friendship Dance Center

snippet.title: Welcome To The Jungle - Official Trailer | In Cinemas 26th June
snippet.description:
Film? Bilkul Fake! Danger? Ekdum Real! Survival Skills? Zero!

Tension out, jungle madness in! Welcome To The Jungle where the mission is unpredictable, the madness is nonstop, and the chaos has a wild side!

Watch the #WelcomeToTheJungleTrailer now and get ready for the wildest adventure of the year!

#WelcomeToTheJungle arrives in cinemas on 26th June, 2026 🍿

Starring: Akshay Kumar, Suniel Shetty, Disha Patani, Jacqueline Fernandez, Arshad Warsi, Jackie Shroff, Paresh Rawal, Raveena Tandon, Lara Dutta, Farida Jalal, Johny Lever, Shreyas Talpade, Tusshar Kapoor, Rajpal Yadav, Krushna Abhishek, Kiku Sharda, Daler Mehndi, Aftab Shivdasani, Mukesh Tiwari, Yashpal Sharma, Kiran Kumar, Zakir Hussain, Vindu Dara Singh, Urvashi Rautela, Hemant Pandey, Brijendra Kala, Feroze Khan(Arjun), Late Pankaj Dheer ji, Puneet Issar, Sudesh Berry, Jeetu Verma, Vrihi Kodvara, Adityaa Singgh, Bhagya Bhanushali 

A.A. Nadiadwala, Cape of Good Films & Star Studio18 presents 
In association with Seeta Films & Rakesh Dang 
A Base Industries Group Production 
Produced by Firoz  A.  Nadiadwallah, Rakesh Dang & Vedant Vikaas Baali
Director: Ahmed Khan
Co Producer: Shaira Ahmed Khan 
Co Producers: Vijay Khanna, Sanjay N. Morakhia 
Associate Producers: Surinder Khanna, Deepak Malhotra, Sonam Pandey, Paras Mehta, Narinder Bains 
Story: Late Neeraj Vora Ji 
Dialogue: Farhad Samji 
DOP: Kabir Lal
Editor: Nitin FCP 
Music Composers: Vikram Montrose, Talwiinder, NDS, Anand Raaj Anand,  Sajid-Wajid
Lyrics: Meggha Bali, Talwiinder, Abhinav Shekhar, Anand Raaj Anand, Shabbir Ahmed 
Music Supervisor: Meggha Bali
Trailer music produced and programmed: Ankit Gupta ( Ankiie )
Music Label: Junglee Music (A division of Times Music)
Executive Producer: Aniket Rao
Second Unit Director: Adnan A. Shaikh
Associate Director: Shukti Sharma
First Assistant Director: Aniket Rao
Script & Continuity Supervisor & Director’s Assistant: Diisha Danait
Seeta Films CEO: Madhukar Verma
Satellite and Digital Syndication: Prem Raj Joshi 
Costume Designers: Kunal Rawal, Anna Singh, Namita Alexander, Ami Patel, Sunakshi Rathod, Shakil Shetty, Priyanka Mundada, Harshita Ramchandani, Shahdab Malik & Trupti Doifode 
Choreographers: Ganesh Acharya, Adil Shaikh, Prince Gupta, Rahul Shetty
Action Director: Abbas Ali Moghul
Original Background Music: Hanif Shaikh
Background Music Sfx: Prince
Production Designer: Shailesh Mahadik
Art Director: Bablu Singh (Arvind)
Second DOP: Shahid Lal
Production Executives: Kawser Ahmed, Shamsher Ali, Aslam Syed, Anjali Verma, Lubaina Merchant, Nikita Zakodia
Accounts: Dilip Chavan, Vinod Rajapkar
CFO: Srinivas P. Kolan
2nd 2nd (Costume) Assistant Director: Prachi Dubey
3rd Assistant Director: Yash Raghuvansshi
Associate Editors: Mahesh Bhojwani, Ashish Patel
Sound Recordist: Rahul Yadav
Re-recording Mixer: Debajit Changmai (Futureworks Media LTD)

snippet.title: ALPHA | Official Teaser | Alia, Sharvari, Anil, Bobby | Shiv Rawail | YRF Spy Universe | 3 July 2026
snippet.description:
Welcome to the newest chapter of the YRF Spy Universe that presents an edgy origin story of a girl raised and built to kill. Alpha is a female-led action film that will take you on a fun, edge of the seat, thrilling ride that is designed as an out and out entertainer.

Yash Raj Films presents Alpha, starring Alia Bhatt, Sharvari, Anil Kapoor, and Bobby Deol. Produced by Aditya Chopra and directed by Shiv Rawail, acclaimed for the globally celebrated series The Railway Men, Alpha is set to release in theatres worldwide on July 3, 2026.

► Subscribe Now: https://goo.gl/xs3mrY 🔔 Stay updated!
► YRF New Releases: https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLCB05E03DA939D484

🎬 Movie Credits:
Movie: Alpha
Starring: Alia Bhatt, Sharvari, Anil Kapoor, Bobby Deol
Director: Shiv Rawail
Producer: Aditya Chopra
Co-Producer: Akshaye Widhani
Screenplay: Soumil Shukla, Shridhar Raghavan
Director of Photography: Rubais
Music: Rohansh & Abeer 
Lyrics: Kumaar, Anvitaa Dutt, Kausar Munir, Rohansh & Abeer
Dialogues: Ishita Moitra
Story: Uday Chopra
Associate Producer: Rishabh Chopra
Executive Producer: Padam Bhushan
Editor: Aarif Sheikh
Production Designers: Subrata Chakraborty, Amit Ray
Action Directors: Craig Macrae, Sunil Rodrigues (ROD)
Sound: Ganesh Gangadharan, Debasish Mishra
Background Music: Sanchit Balhara, Ankit Balhara
Costume Designers: Aki Narula, Natasha Vohra, Deepali Singh Raseen, Gunpreet Kaur Mann 
Director of Choreography: Vijay Ganguly, Bosco Leslie Martis
Visual Effects Studio: yFX
Casting Director: Shanoo Sharma
Trailers & Promos: Mohit Sajnaney
Release Date: 3rd July 2026

Stay in the filmy loop:
► Like us on Facebook: Facebook/yrf
► Follow us on X: x.com/yrf
► Follow us on Instagram: Instagram/yrf
► Visit us on: yashrajfilms.com

About YRF Spy Universe:
YRF Spy Universe is a first of its kind cinematic universe of spy thriller films in India. The first film in the universe, "Ek Tha Tiger", starring Salman Khan and Katrina Kaif was released in 2012, followed by its sequel "Tiger Zinda Hai" in 2017. The third film in the universe, "War" was released in 2019 and starred Hrithik Roshan and Tiger Shroff in pivotal roles. "Pathaan" was the fourth instalment in the Spy Universe franchise which was released in 2023 starring Shah Rukh Khan, Deepika Padukone and John Abraham. "Tiger 3", the fifth instalment in the YRF Spy Universe and the third film in the Tiger series, starring Salman Khan, Katrina Kaif and Emraan Hashmi, released in 2023. "War 2", the sixth film in the YRF Spy Universe, starring Hrithik Roshan, NTR and Kiara Advani, directed by Ayan Mukerji, released on 14 August 2025. "Alpha", the seventh film in the franchise and Hindi cinema’s first female-led YRF Spy Universe film, starring Alia Bhatt and Sharvari, will release on 3 July 2026.

© Yash Raj Films Pvt. Ltd.

snippet.title: Dhamaal 4 (Trailer): Ajay Devgn, Arshad W, Riteish D, Jaaved J| Indra K| Bhushan K, Ashok T| 10 July
snippet.description:
Theek saamne, aapko woh play button dikh raha hai? Haan, usse daba dijiye ▶️🚨

Presenting the Official Trailer of “Dhamaal 4” directed by Indra Kumar starring Ajay Devgn, Arshad Warsi, Riteish Deshmukh, Jaaved Jaaferi, Ravi Kishan, Sanjay Mishra, Upendra Limaye, Anjali Anand, Sanjeeda Shaikh & Esha Gupta.

Watch the biggest family entertainer #Dhamaal4 in cinemas worldwide from 10th July!

Gulshan Kumar & T-Series Present
In Association With Devgn Films
A T-Series Films, Maruti International, Panorama Studios Production

"DHAMAAL 4"

Join the madness of Dhamaal 4 and get ready for a laughter riot like never before. Hit ‘I’m Interested’ now for exclusive offers, updates, & more only on BookMyShow.
Link: https://bookmy.show/D4HI

snippet.title: Salala Karnali | Pramod Kharel | Pramod & Parampara | Official Music Video
snippet.description:
A soulful tribute to the beauty of Karnali, "Salala Karnali" brings together the timeless voice of Pramod Kharel with the words and music of Suraj Thapa. Shot amid the breathtaking landscapes of Jumla, this song is a heartfelt celebration of love, land, and the spirit of the Karnali region.

🎵 SONG: Salala Karnali

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
🎤 AUDIO CREDITS
Lyrics / Music: 
Suraj Thapa

Vocal: 
Pramod Kharel

Supporting Vocal: 
Shristi Budha

Music Arrangement: 
Pramod & Parampara, Suraj Thapa

Additional Music Arrangement: 
Rahul Bhujel

Intro Lyrics: 
Bhim BC

Intro Song Composition: 
Pramod Kharel

Chorus: 
Bikram Karki, Pratik Biswokarma, Suraj Thapa

Recorded at: 
Studio M Nepal

Recordist: 
Manjil KC

Female Melody Recorded at: 
Maruni Digital (by Suman Rama)

Mix & Mastering: 
Kishor Thapa (A One Musician Studio)

Digital Management: 
Manoz Sapkota

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
🎬 VIDEO CREDITS
Featuring: 
Pramod Kharel & Ashwini Shahi

Direction: 
Laxman Paudyal

DOP: 
Arjun Tiwari

Visual Edit / Color Grading: 
Milan Bishwokarma

Post: 
Dragon Pictures (📞 9843866422)

Producer: 
Dipa Sitaula

MUA: 
Geet Lama

Production Manager: 
Bishal Karkee

Publicity Design: 
Shann Thapa

Media Coordination: 
Gopi Krishana Chapagain

Dress Partner: 
Kalo Falam

Hair Partner: 
Royal Milano

Hospitality Partner: 
Apricus Garden Restaurant

Supported by: 
Gaau Besi Logistics

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
🙏 We are grateful to Hon. Gyanedra Shahi.
Heartful thanks to Talfi, Patarashi Rural Municipality, and all the local residents of Jumla.

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

snippet.title: Arijit Singh - Tujhko (from Cocktail 2) Rashmika Mandanna, Shahid Kapoor & Kriti | Love Song 2026
snippet.description:
✨ Presenting a special tribute to "Tujhko" – the beautifully soulful and romantic track from the upcoming movie Cocktail 2! Featuring the incredible chemistry of Shahid Kapoor and Rashmika Mandanna, this song beautifully blends romance with deep emotion.

If you love this track as much as I do, don't forget to LIKE, SHARE, COMMENT, and SUBSCRIBE for more music content! 🔔

#Tujhko #Cocktail2 #ArijitSingh #SunidhiChauhan #Pritam #ShahidKapoor #RashmikaMandanna #LatestHindiSongs #RomanticSongs2026

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

#WelcomeToTheJungle #thePJ #PJExplained

My Social Media Handles: 
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/pjexplained/
Twitter: https://twitter.com/pjexplained/
SnapChat: https://www.snapchat.com/add/pjexplained

Threads: https://www.threads.net/@pjexplained 
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/pjexplained/
WhatsApp: https://shorturl.at/vQxpU

The thePJ is a web channel intended to promote cinema through films review, interviews, discussions, video essays and analytical compilations. It is intended primarily for the purpose of encouraging informed discussions, criticism and review of cinema and towards such purpose the programs use short extracts of cinematograph films, sounds recording and photographic works. These clips and extracts are of a minimal nature and the use is not intended to interfere in any manner with their commercial exploitation of the compete work by the owners of the copyright. The use of works are in compliance with the fair dealing exception provided under Sec. 52 of the Copyright Act, and we asset our use of the works under the exception provided for criticism and review.

These clips and extracts are of a minimal nature and the use is not intended to interfere in any manner with their commercial exploitation of the compete work by the owners of the copyright. The use of works are in compliance with the fair dealing exception provided under Sec. 52 of the Copyright Act, and we asset our use of the works under the exception provided for criticism and review.

bn.description:

thePJ হলো একটি ওয়েব চ্যানেল, যার উদ্দেশ্য হলো চলচ্চিত্র পর্যালোচনা, সাক্ষাৎকার, আলোচনা, ভিডিও প্রবন্ধ এবং বিশ্লেষণধর্মী সংকলনের মাধ্যমে সিনেমার প্রচার করা। এর প্রধান উদ্দেশ্য হলো সিনেমা নিয়ে তথ্যসমৃদ্ধ আলোচনা, সমালোচনা এবং পর্যালোচনাকে উৎসাহিত করা এবং এই লক্ষ্যে অনুষ্ঠানগুলোতে চলচ্চিত্র, শব্দ রেকর্ডিং এবং আলোকচিত্রের সংক্ষিপ্ত অংশ ব্যবহার করা হয়। এই ক্লিপ এবং অংশবিশেষগুলো খুবই সামান্য এবং এর ব্যবহার কপিরাইটের মালিকদের দ্বারা সম্পূর্ণ কাজটির বাণিজ্যিক ব্যবহারে কোনোভাবেই হস্তক্ষেপ করার উদ্দেশ্যে নয়। কাজগুলোর ব্যবহার কপিরাইট আইনের ৫২ ধারার অধীনে প্রদত্ত ন্যায্য ব্যবহারের ব্যতিক্রমের সাথে সঙ্গতিপূর্ণ, এবং আমরা সমালোচনা ও পর্যালোচনার জন্য প্রদত্ত ব্যতিক্রমের অধীনে কাজগুলো ব্যবহারের দাবি করি।

snippet.title: Chunnari Chunnari - Let’s Go | Hai Jawani Toh Ishq Hona Hai | Varun, Mrunal, Pooja | Akshay & IP
snippet.description:
🔥 Get ready to groove to the ultimate dance song of the year — Chunnari Chunnari - Let’s Go! 💃✨
From the much-awaited Bollywood entertainer Hai Jawani Toh Ishq Hona Hai, this electrifying track brings back the iconic 90s vibe with a fresh party twist! 🎶❤️

With peppy beats, colorful energy, and vocals that will make you hit repeat, this song is all set to rule your playlists and dance floors! 🕺🔥

Stay updated with the latest videos from Tips Official, Subscribe on the below link.
http://youtube.com/tipsofficial

Hai Jawani Toh Ishq Hona Hai In Cinemas Now

Song Credits : 
Song Title: Chunnari Chunnari - Let’s Go!
Music Composer: Akshay & IP
Additional Lyrics: IP Singh
Singers: IP Singh, Jonita Gandhi, Asees Kaur, Sudhir Yaduvanshi, Anuradha Sriram
Music Produced & Arranged: Akshay Raheja, Abhishek Singh
Guitars: Chaitanya Bhaidkar
Mix & Master: Abhishek Ghatak
Original Music: Anu Malik
Original Lyrics: Sameer Anjaan
Director Of Choreography: Remo D'souza

Movie Details: 
Tips Films Ltd Presents
Hai Jawani Toh Ishq Hona Hai
Directed By David Dhawan
Produced By Ramesh Taurani
Cast: Varun Dhawan, Mrunal Thakur, Pooja Hegde, Maniesh Paul, Chunky Pandey, Jimmy Shergill, Mouni Roy
Co-Producer: Gaurav Bose (Maximilian Films UK)
DOP: Ayananka Bose
Story & Screenplay Writer: Yunus Sajawal
Dialogue Writer: Farhad Samji
Music: White Noise Collectives, Tanishk Bagchi, Rony Ajnali, Gill Macchrai (Classy Beats), Javed - Mohsin, Akshay & IP
Lyrics: Vayu, Jairaj, Mohsin Shaikh, Rony Ajnali & Gill Macchrai (Classy Beats), IP Singh
Director Of Choreography: Remo D'souza, Bosco Martis, Vijay Ganguly
Editor: Ritesh Soni
Head Of Production: Varsha Taurani
Production Designer: Late Rajat Poddar & Parijat Poddar
Action Director: Sunil Rodrigues

Sound Recording & Sound Design:  Parikshit Lavani & Kunal Mehhta (CSD Studio)
Background Score Raju Singh
Costume Designer Aki Narula, Samidha Wangnoo
Associate Producer Prakash Talreja
Executive Producer Sushil Tirwadkar
Line Producer Sudipto (Sid) Sarkar (UK)
Associate Director Aakar Kauoshik
Associate Editor: Sanket Rajadhyaksha
Re-Recording Mixer: Justin Jose K (Cas)
Casting Director Mukesh Chhabra (Csa) & Rachita Kapoor (UK)
Di Studio : Redefine
Di Colourist Ashirwad Hadkar (Isc)
Vfx Do It Creative Ltd (UK)
Post Producer Murli Shah
Publicity Design: Parass Kanani (  House Of AWE)
Media Consultant : Nilufer Qureshi (Hype)

Marketing Consultant:  Yash Suchak & Suraj Rao (Grey Alchemy)
Digital Agency: White Rivers Media
Visual Promotions Ma & Th (Marching Ants & Trigger Happy)
UK Production Maximilian Films Ltd. 

Lyrics : 
Chunari-Chunari
 
Saari Raen Din
Saara Chaen Mera
Hosh Tabiyat Lutt Ke Lae Gayi,
 
Udti Jaaye Banke Patang,
Kar Mujhko Tang Ye Kya Hai Keh Gayi,
 
Lehraaye Besharmi Se
Tadpaaye Berehmi Se
Chhoo Loon Tu Kehde Jo Zaraa.
 
Aaja Na Chhoo Le Meri Chunari Sanam
Kuchh Na Main Bolun Tujhey Meri Qasam.
 
Aaya Deewaana Darr Pe Tere
Tere Bin Kya Karoon Bataa De Bereham.
 
Mhare Dil Mein Bajee Pichkari,
Rangi Main Poori Thaari Sajna,
Teri Choonar Manay Samjhaa Ri,
Ke Ho Gi Tu Hai Mhaari Sajnaa.

snippet.title: Mohammad Faiz – Eyes (Official Video) | Starring Akanksha Choudhary
snippet.description:
Eyes is an R&B Trap and Rajasthani Pop song that fuses modern sounds with Rajasthani roots. A story of love, attraction, and the emotions hidden behind a glance, the song captures what words often cannot express. 


Audio Credits :

Singing, composition and Lyrics - Mohammad Faiz 
Music - Hiten
Mix and Master - Hiten
Recording engineer - Mrigank

Starring - Akanksha Choudhary 

Video Credits :

Director - Mohammad Faiz 
DOP, Creative Director - Arshad Khan
First AD - Sahiba Khan
Ad - Shahrukh khan
Editor, DI - Inkblaze Studios
VFX - Harshit 
Producer - Mohammad Faiz 
Project Manager - Prateek Ramawat 
Costume designers - Faiz, Sahiba Khan and FilAishé 
LP - Shahrukh khan
Production - Everest Studios
Production manager - Ankur Tanwar
Asst. Production manager - Jatin Aman
Gaffer - Subhash Kumar
Hair - Azrudin 
Make up - Dhanwantari Swami 
BTS - Manoj Ramawat and Kamal khaj
Security - Murli Manohar
Dressman - Jitesh Kumar
Tailor - Udaykant mandal
Spot - Team Kamal
Lights - Light camera aktion and Shreeji lights
Lighting team - Sushil Sahu, Nitish, Raj, Virendar, Hemanth, Ravi and Rahul
Artwork - The Visuals Vague





Lyrics : 

Kai Raatan di tu jagaa
Heartbeat bhi di tu bhaga
Meri zindagi ma ab to
Maalum ha mhane ke laga 
chaand chaar devagi
Teri ankhya do
Mhane maar devagi
Teri aankhya do
Atto pyaar devagi
Teri ankhya do
Mhane maar devagi
Teri aankhya do
Mhane maar devagi
Teri aankhya do
Atto pyaar devagi…

Mhane maar devagi…
Atto pyaar devagi…
Mhane maar devagi
Teri aankhya do 
Atto pyaar devagi…

Tane soch, tere liye saaro gaaya jaave shehar
Teri sunke awaaz hi surilo pad gyo
Jaipur na bhi kargi gulabi chhori
Tane dekh saaro jodhpur neelo pad gyo

Koi sachoge bhi koni aiso kaam krdyuń
Tera qadma ka nicha saaro gaam krdyuń
Bol aaj hi miladyuń tana maa sa meri
Mera ghar haali chaabya tera naam krdyuń

Ab koni hova ha sabar
Aake puch la meri khabar
Dil sach mero keva ha agar
Mera har ek birthday par
Uphaar devagi
Teri ankhya do
Mhane maar devagi
Teri aankhya do
Atto pyaar devagi
Teri ankhya do
Mhane maar devagi…

Mhane maar devagi
Teri aankhya do
Mhane maar devagi
Teri aankhya do
Atto pyaar devagi
Teri ankhya do
Mhane maar devagi…

Mhane maar devagi…
Atto pyaar devagi…
Mhane maar devagi
Teri aankhya do
Atto Pyaar devagi…

Translation :

You've kept me awake through countless nights,And set my heartbeat racing wild.
Now in my life, I've finally realized,What true love feels like.
Your two eyes will light up my world,Like moonlight blessing every corner.
Your two eyes will slay me.
Your two eyes will shower me with love.
Your two eyes will slay me.
Your two eyes will slay me.
Your two eyes will shower me with love.
Your two eyes will slay me.
Your two eyes will shower me with love.
Your two eyes will slay me.
Your two eyes will shower me with love.
Thinking of you set the whole city singing,Your voice made every melody sweeter.
You made even Jaipur blush a deeper pink, girl,And one look at you turned all of Jodhpur blue.
No one would believe I'd go this far,I'd lay the whole city at your feet.
Say the word, I'll introduce you to my mother today,I'll hand you my home's keys in your hand.
I can no longer be patient,Come and ask how I've been.
If my heart truly speaks the truth,Then on every birthday of mine,
Your two eyes will be the gift,I wait to receive each year.
Your two eyes will slay me.
Your two eyes will shower me with love.
Your two eyes will slay me.
Your two eyes will slay me.
Your two eyes will slay me.
Your two eyes will shower me with love.
Your two eyes will slay me.
Your two eyes will slay me.
Your two eyes will shower me with love.
Your two eyes will slay me.
Your two eyes will shower me with love.

Your two eyes will light up my world,Like moonlight blessing every corner.
Your two eyes will slay me.
Your two eyes will shower me with love.
Your two eyes will slay me.
Your two eyes will slay me.
Your two eyes will shower me with love.
Your two eyes will slay me.
Your two eyes will shower me with love.
Your two eyes will slay me.
Your two eyes will shower me with love.
Thinking of you set the whole city singing,Your voice made every melody sweeter.
You made even Jaipur blush a deeper pink, girl,And one look at you turned all of Jodhpur blue.
No one would believe I'd go this far,I'd lay the whole city at your feet.
Say the word, I'll introduce you to my mother today,I'll hand you my home's keys in your hand.
I can no longer be patient,Come and ask how I've been.
If my heart truly speaks the truth,Then on every birthday of mine,
Your two eyes will be the gift,I wait to receive each year.
Your two eyes will slay me.
Your two eyes will shower me with love.
Your two eyes will slay me.
Your two eyes will slay me.
Your two eyes will slay me.

snippet.title: SlumDog: 33 Temple Road-Official Teaser (Hindi) | Vijay Sethupathi, Tabu, Samyuktha | Puri Jagannadh
snippet.description:
Watch SlumDog - 33 Temple Road Teaser - Hindi!

SlumDog - 33 Temple Road is an upcoming gritty pan-India action drama which brings dashing director Puri Jagannadh and versatile actor Makkalselvan Vijay Sethupathi together for one of the most intriguing collaborations. Produced by Puri Jagannadh and Charmme Kaur under the Puri Connects banner, in collaboration with JB Narayan Rao Kondrolla's JB Motion Pictures. 

Cast: Makkalselvan Vijay Sethupathi, Tabu, Samyuktha, Duniya Vijay Kumar, VTV Ganesh, Brahmaji and Others.

Technical Crew:
Writer & Director: Puri Jagannadh
Producers: Puri Jagannadh, Charmme Kaur, JB Narayan Rao Kondrolla
Presents: Charmme Kaur
Banner: Puri Connects
CEO: Vishu Reddy
Music: Harshavardhan Rameshwar
Cinematographer: Sam K Naidu
Editor: Santosh Noozilla
Art Directors: Ashish Teja & Jonny Shaik
Co-Director: Jiten Sharmaa
Marketing: Haashtag Media

snippet.title: Aaj Se Teri - Lyrical | Padman | Akshay Kumar & Radhika Apte | Arijit Singh | Amit Trivedi
snippet.description:
Singer - Arijit Singh
Music - Amit Trivedi
Lyricist - Kausar Munir

Crew Names:-
Produced & Arranged by - Amit Trivedi
Recording Engineers A T Studios  Mumbai  - Abhishek Sortey & Urmila Sutar 
Assisted by  Firoz Shaikh
Mixed by - Shadab Rayeen,  A T Studios & New Edge - Mumbai Assisted by : Abhishek Sortey & Dhananjay Khapekar
Mastered by - Donal Whelan, Masteringworld - U.K.
Executive Producer A T Studios - Krutee Trivedi
Head Of Production A T Studios - Aashish Narula

Musician Names:-
Programmed by Amit Trivedi, Gourab Dutta & Raja Rasaily
Dholak & Percussions - Sanket Naik  
Mandolin, Saz & Bouzouki - Tapas Roy  
Shehnai - Omkar Dhumal

Cast - Akshay Kumar, Radhika Apte & Sonam Kapoor
Production House - Hope Production Pvt Ltd
Producer - Twinkle Khanna, SPE Films India, KriArj Entertainment, Cape Of Good Films & Hope Productions
Director - R Balki

Lyrics:
Mukhda -
Aaj Se Teri Saari Galiyaan Meri Ho Gayi, 
Aaj Se Mera Ghar Tera Ho Gaya…

Aaj Se Teri Saari Galiyaan Meri Ho Gayi, 
Aaj Se Mera Ghar Tera Ho Gaya…
Aaj Se Meri Saari Khushiyaan Teri Ho Gayi,
Aaj Se Tera Gum Mera Ho Gaya. 

Ho Tere Kandhe Ka Jo Til Hai, 
Ho Tera Seene Mein Jo Dil Hai, 
Ho Teri Bijli Ka Jo Bill Hai-
Aaj Se Mera Ho Gaya…

Ho Mere Khwabon Ka Ambar,
Ho Meri Khushiyon Ka Samandar,
Ho Mere Pin Code Ka Number-
Aaj Se Tera Ho Gaya. 

Antara 1- 
Tere Maathe Aaaaa….Tere Maathe Ke Kumkum Ko
Main Tilak Lagaa Ke Ghoomoonga, 
Teri Baali Ki Chhunchhun Ko
Main Dil Se Lagaa Ke Jhoomoonga…

Meri Chhoti Si Bhoolon, 
Ko Tu Nadiya Mein Baha Dena.
Tere Jude Ke Phoolon Ko, 
Main Apne Shirt Mein Pehnoonga.

Bas Mere Liye Tu Maalpue Kabhi Kabhi Bana Dena…

Aaj Se Meri Saari Ratiyaan Teri Ho Gayi, 
Aaj Se Tera Din Mera Ho Gaya. 

Ho Tere Kandhe Ka Jo Til Hai, 
Ho Tera Seene Mein Jo Dil Hai, 
Ho Teri Bijli Ka Jo Bill Hai-
Aaj Se Mera Ho Gaya…

Ho Mere Khwabon Ka Ambar,
Ho Meri Khushiyon Ka Samandar,
Ho Mere Pin Code Ka Number-
Aaj Se Tera Ho Gaya. 

Antara 2-
Tu Maange Sardi Mein Amiya, 
Jo Maange Garmi Mein Mungphaliyaan, 
Tu Baarish Mein Agar Keh De,
Ja Mere Liye Tu Dhoop Khila.

Toh Main Sooraj……. Toh Main Sooraj Ko Jhatak Doonga, 
Toh Main Saawan Ko Gatak Loonga,
Toh Saare Taaron Sang Chanda
Main Teri Goad Mein Rakh Doonga-

Bas Mere Liye Tu Khil Ke Kabhi Muskuraa Dena…

Aaj Se Meri Saari Sadiyaan Teri Ho Gayi, 
Aaj Se Tera Pal Mera Ho Gaya. 

Ho Tere Kandhe Ka Jo Til Hai, 
Ho Tere Seene Mein Jo Dil Hai, 
Ho Teri Bijli Ka Jo Bill Hai-
Aaj Se Mera Ho Gaya…

Ho Mere Khwaabon Ka Ambar,
Ho Meri Khushiyon Ka Samandar,
Ho Mere Pin Code Ka Number-
Aaj Se ……Tera Ho Gaya.

#PadmanSongs #ArijitSinghSongs #AkshayKumarSongs #NewHindiSongs

#bollywoodlyricalsongs #trendingsongs #romanticsongs #newhindisongs #lyrical

snippet.title: Dhurandhar ke Baad Yeh Universe Ka Kya Hoga: Alpha Teaser EXPOSED
snippet.description:
🔥 ALPHA Teaser Reaction & Review | Alia Bhatt | Sharvari | Anil Kapoor | YRF Spy Universe 🔥

In this video, I share my honest reaction and detailed review of the much-awaited ALPHA Teaser starring Alia Bhatt, Sharvari, and Anil Kapoor from the legendary YRF Spy Universe. 🎬

The teaser looks intense, action-packed, and promises a powerful female-led spy thriller. In this reaction video, we break down the teaser, discuss the action sequences, performances, storyline hints, YRF Spy Universe connections, hidden details, and what fans can expect from the movie.

💥 Is ALPHA going to be the next blockbuster in the YRF Spy Universe? 💥 How does Alia Bhatt look as a spy? 💥 What role will Sharvari and Anil Kapoor play? 💥 Teaser Breakdown, Easter Eggs & Fan Theories!

Watch till the end and share your thoughts in the comments. Don't forget to Like, Share & Subscribe for more reactions, reviews, and entertainment content.

bn.description:
🔥 আলফা টিজার প্রতিক্রিয়া ও পর্যালোচনা | আলিয়া ভাট | শারভারি | অনিল কাপুর | ওয়াইআরএফ স্পাই ইউনিভার্স 🔥

এই ভিডিওতে, আমি কিংবদন্তী ওয়াইআরএফ স্পাই ইউনিভার্সের আলিয়া ভাট, শারভারি এবং অনিল কাপুর অভিনীত বহু প্রতীক্ষিত 'আলফা' টিজারের উপর আমার অকপট প্রতিক্রিয়া এবং বিস্তারিত পর্যালোচনা তুলে ধরেছি। 🎬

টিজারটি বেশ উত্তেজনাপূর্ণ, অ্যাকশন-ভরা এবং একটি শক্তিশালী নারী-প্রধান স্পাই থ্রিলারের প্রতিশ্রুতি দিচ্ছে। এই প্রতিক্রিয়া ভিডিওতে, আমরা টিজারটি বিশ্লেষণ করেছি এবং এর অ্যাকশন সিকোয়েন্স, অভিনয়, গল্পের ইঙ্গিত, ওয়াইআরএফ স্পাই ইউনিভার্সের সংযোগ, লুকানো বিবরণ এবং ভক্তরা সিনেমাটি থেকে কী আশা করতে পারেন, তা নিয়ে আলোচনা করেছি।

💥 আলফা কি ওয়াইআরএফ স্পাই ইউনিভার্সের পরবর্তী ব্লকবাস্টার হতে চলেছে? 💥 একজন গুপ্তচর হিসেবে আলিয়া ভাটকে কেমন লাগছে? 💥 শারভারি এবং অনিল কাপুর কী চরিত্রে অভিনয় করবেন? 💥 টিজার বিশ্লেষণ, ইস্টার এগস ও ফ্যান থিওরি!

শেষ পর্যন্ত দেখুন এবং কমেন্টে আপনার মতামত জানান। আরও রিঅ্যাকশন, রিভিউ এবং বিনোদনমূলক কন্টেন্টের জন্য লাইক, শেয়ার ও সাবস্ক্রাইব করতে ভুলবেন না।

#আলফা #আলফাটিজার
#আলফাটিজারপ্রতিক্রিয়া
#আলফাটিজাররিভিউ
#আলফাটিজারপাবলিকপ্রতিক্রিয়া
#আলফাটিজারপাবলিকরিভিউ
#আলফাটিজারব্রেকডাউন
#আলফামুভি #আলিয়াভাট #শারভারি #অনিলকাপুর #ওয়াইআরএফস্পাইইউনিভার্স #আলফাপ্রতিক্রিয়া #আলফারিভিউ #বলিউডপ্রতিক্রিয়া #টিজারপ্রতিক্রিয়া #মুভিরিভিউ #স্পাইইউনিভার্স #ওয়াইআরএফ #বলিউডমুভি #অ্যাকশনমুভি #হিন্দিসিনেমা #মুভিপ্রতিক্রিয়া #বিনোদন #ট্রেন্ডিং #ভাইরালভিডিও #আলিয়াভাটফ্যান #শারভারিওয়াঘ #অনিলকাপুরফ্যান #বলিউডনিউজ #আসন্নমুভি #প্রতিক্রিয়াভিডিও #টিজারব্রেকডাউন #মুভিআপডেট #ভারতীয়সিনেমা #সিনেমাপ্রেমী

আলফা টিজার প্রতিক্রিয়া, আলফা টিজার রিভিউ, আলফা সিনেমার প্রতিক্রিয়া, আলফা সিনেমার রিভিউ, আলিয়া ভাট আলফা, শারভারি আলফা, অনিল কাপুর আলফা, ওয়াইআরএফ স্পাই ইউনিভার্স, আলফা টিজারের বিশ্লেষণ, আলফা ইস্টার এগস, আলফা লুকানো বিবরণ, আলফা ফ্যান থিওরি, বলিউডের প্রতিক্রিয়া, বলিউড রিভিউ, সিনেমার প্রতিক্রিয়া, টিজারের প্রতিক্রিয়া, আলফা ট্রেলারের প্রতিক্রিয়া, আলফা সিনেমার আপডেট, ওয়াইআরএফ সিনেমা, স্পাই ইউনিভার্স সিনেমা, আলিয়া ভাটের নতুন সিনেমা, শারভারির নতুন সিনেমা, অনিল কাপুরের নতুন সিনেমা, বলিউডের সর্বশেষ খবর, ট্রেন্ডিং বলিউড

snippet.title: Gram Chikitsalay Season 2 - Official Trailer | Prime Video India
snippet.description:
Prime Video India Presents
Gram Chikitsalay Season 2 Official Trailer 
Starring Amol Parashar, Vinay Pathak, Akansha Ranjan Kapoor, Anandeshwar Dwivedi, Akash Makhija, Garima Vikrant Singh, Dinesh Lal Yadav
A TVF Creation
Produced by Arunabh Kumar
Created by Deepak Kumar Mishra, Arunabh Kumar
Directed by Lalitam Anand
Written by Vaibhav-Shreya
Co-Produced by Vijay Koshy

Official Release Date - June 23, 2026 on Prime Video India

About:
The young, idealistic and brilliant Dr. Prabhat, takes charge of a neglected Primary Health Centre in a North India Village hoping to bring about much needed changes only to realise it is he who will have to change before anything else.      

Follow us on:
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/primevideoin/
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/PrimeVideoIN/
X: https://x.com/PrimeVideoIN

ABOUT PRIME VIDEO
Prime Video is a one-stop entertainment destination offering customers a vast collection of premium programming in one application available across several devices. On Prime Video, customers can find their favourite Indian and international original series, movies, TV shows, and more, across multiple languages – including Indian-produced Original series like Mirzapur, Farzi, Panchayat, The Family Man, Dhootha, Jubilee, Dahaad, Made in Heaven, Suzhal – The Vortex, Inspector Rishi, Poacher, Indian Police Force, Paatal Lok, Rainbow Rishta, Wedding.con; Original movies like Maja Ma, Ammu, Mast Mein Rehne Ka; popular global Originals like Citadel, The Lord of The Rings: The Rings of Power, Fallout, Reacher, The Boys, The Wheel of Time, Road House, The Idea of You; some of the biggest post-theatrical films; direct-to-service films such as Shershaah, Soorarai Pottru, Sardar Udham, Bawaal, Gehraiyaan, Jai Bhim, Jalsa, Sherni, Narappa, Sarpatta Parambarai, Kuruthi, Joji, Malik, Pippa, HOME, Sharmajee Ki Beti, and many more of such titles. Additionally, Prime Video’s video entertainment marketplace, offers customers programming from partners such as Lionsgate Play, Discovery+ Crunchyroll, BBC Player, Sony Pictures – Stream, MGM+, FanCode, Chaupal, Manorama Max, Eros Now, Hoichoi, Anime Times, to name a few, via Prime Video add-on-subscriptions, as well as the option to rent movies, regardless of whether customers have a Prime membership or not. Customers can also go behind the scenes of their favorite movies and series with exclusive X-Ray access. Prime Video is one benefit among many that provides savings, convenience, and entertainment as part of the Prime membership. For more info visit www.amazon.com/primevideo.

snippet.title: The Booyah Awards 2026 - Still on Top or Taken Over? | Free Fire MAX
snippet.description:
Welcome to The Booyah Awards 2026, the biggest celebration of the Free Fire MAX community.

After a year of clutch Booyahs, viral moments, unforgettable streams, and incredible content, it's time to crown the creators, players, and personalities who defined the year. But with new challengers rising every day, the question remains:

🔥 Are the legends still on top?

Join us for an evening packed with awards, entertainment, special appearances, and the biggest names in Free Fire MAX.

Who will take home the glory? 

#FreeFireMAX #Booyah

snippet.title: Bipul Chettri - Bhawana (Official Music Video)
snippet.description:
Bhawana explores the inner struggles of the mind, feelings of anxiety, loneliness and self-doubt. It emphasises the importance of self-compassion, seeking support, and allowing space to heal affirming that even in moments of darkness, recovery and inner peace are possible, when help is provided for.

MUSIC
Bipul Chettri - Vocal, Guitar, Backing Vocals
Pranai Gurung - Guitars
Rahul Rai - Bass
Achint Khare - Keys, Organ
Aman Singh Rathore - Drums

Lyrics, Composition and Arrangement by Bipul Chettri
Recorded by Anindo Bose
Mixed and Mastered by Binaya Man Amatya
Producer - Bipul Chettri
Executive Producer - Sonam Tashi

VIDEO
Starring - Bishakha Thapa
Performers - Endo Mrinal, Deo Dorjay Yolmo

Directed by - Gundruk
Director of Photography - Vashistha Pradhan
Executive Producer - Mitali Solanki

Assistant Director - Thushar Shivam
Assistant Camera - Mrinal Sharma

Edited by - Dishant & Vazzu
Color - AB Studios

Co-Producer - Vazzu
Production House - Lasta Studio

Costume Designer - Lochana Tamang
Masterji - Abdul Sattar Sheikh

Casting & Styling Associate - Endo
Choreographer - Deo Dorjay

Production Design - Mitali, Thushar, Lochana
Art Direction - Thushar, Mitali, Dishant

Miniature Set Design - Juhu Beach Studio
Title Design - James Shehzada Murthy

Extras - Akshara, Prakruthi, Thushar, Mrinal

Location & Art Courtesy - Handyyman

Camera Rental - Accord Equips
Focus Puller - Pappu Kumar
Camera Attendant - Pankaj Joshi, Tukaram Garate

Light Boys - Vishal Gadigoankar, Subin Rai, Vishwajeet Mahato
Spot Boys - Chandan Yadav, Bipin Kumar

Studio Location - Chaubara, by Veda Factory

Media Partner - The Darjeeling Chronicle

snippet.title: Sujan Chapagain | Gajale Sunchari [ गाजले सुनचरी ] ArtMandu | Travel Song | Feat. Sampada & Samishan
snippet.description:
Sujan Chapagain | Gajale Sunchari [ गाजले सुनचरी ] ArtMandu | Travel Song | Feat. Sampada & Samishan

Chitwan ❤️
the place where I took my first breath, walked my first steps, discovered the world for the first time, and heard my first music. Today, with love and gratitude for that homeland, I am proud to present my travel song, “Gajale Sunchari.”

This song is dedicated to all the wandering souls who love to travel freely, explore new places, and discover the beauty of life along the way.


Audio Credits

Lyrics
Hark Saud

Vocal & Music
Sujan Chapagain

Poem
Pallawib

Music Producer/Mixing/Mastering
Kobid Bazra

Strings Orchestration and Recordings
Bikesh Bazra

Tabla
Jagannath Dhaugoda

Keys

en.title: Sujan Chapagain | Gajale Sunchari [ गाजले सुनचरी ] ArtMandu | Travel Song | Feat. Sampada & Samishan
en.description:
Sujan Chapagain | Gajale Sunchari [ गाजले सुनचरी ] ArtMandu | Travel Song | Feat. Sampada & Samishan

Chitwan ❤️
the place where I took my first breath, walked my first steps, discovered the world for the first time, and heard my first music. Today, with love and gratitude for that homeland, I am proud to present my travel song, “Gajale Sunchari.”

This song is dedicated to all the wandering souls who love to travel freely, explore new places, and discover the beauty of life along the way.

Bina tere koi dilkash nazara hum na dekhenge

Woh sheesha tod denge hum
Agar tum mil jao
Zamaana chhod denge hum

Tere dil mein rahenge
Tujhko apna ghar bana lenge

snippet.description:
Download BGMI now: https://bgmi.go.link/2w5kg

The pressure rises as BMPS 2026 Semi Finals enter Day 3!

With two days of action completed, teams now have a clearer picture of where they stand. Some will be looking to strengthen their hold on the Top 6, while others will be fighting to break into the qualification spots before it's too late.

All groups return to the battleground for another day of high-stakes action where every finish and placement point could shape the final standings

💰 Total Prize Pool: ₹4Cr

snippet.title: The Elements | Thula Thula Sahar (EL3 Rendition)
snippet.description:
EL3 Renditions 

We revisit these stories after 10 years.. Some thing have changed, some things have not. In the mists of Tanahu . 

Video by : 
Sujan Bahadur Basnet 
Siddhartha Shakya (Sid)

Audio Recorded at : Elements HQ 
Produced by : Brihat Pahari | Raunaq Singh Adhikari
                         PaintBox Studios 


Lyrics:
thula thula sahar
thulai soch hola
beglai cha najar
tara sakkincha hola

thula thula mahal
akashai chekkincha hola
sararara motor ma kudincha hola

aye hai yo thawai ma
mann bhane chai tei gauwai ma
kate ma hai
kayou khola
mutu bhane 
kati rola

hawa le choyo
beglai lagyo sparsha 
khusi khojna nai
paila sardo raicha

auna ta mann thiyena 
mero baani chalan bhindai
paristhiti testai 
aye sabai nata uchindai

aye hai yo thawai ma
mann bhane chai tei gauwai ma
kate ma hai
kayou khola
mutu bhane 
kati rola

snippet.title: Manjurinama Deuna Maichyang || Bishwo Dong & Alina Yonjan || New Selo Song 2026/2082
snippet.description:
🎶 Presenting New Selo Song 2026/2082
"Manjurinama Deuna Maichyang" by Bishwo Dong & Alina Yonjan.
Hope you all enjoy this beautiful selo audio song. 
Don’t forget to Like, Share & Subscribe for more new Tamang songs. ❤️

🎧 Song : Manjurinama Deuna Maichyang
🎤 Vocal : Bishwo Dong / Alina Yonjan
✍️🎼 Lyrics / Music / Arrange : Bishwo Dong
🎚 Mixing / Mastering : Dipesh Pradhan (Deep Studio)
🎙 Studio : Dong Studio
🤝 Supporter : Lal Dhoj Tamang

© All Rights Reserved

🔔 Subscribe for more new Tamang Selo songs
👍 Like | Comment | Share

#ManjurinamaDeunaMaichyang
#BishwoDong
#AlinaYonjan
#TamangSeloSong
#NewSeloSong2026
#NepaliSong
#TamangSong
#DongStudio
----------------------------------------------------
१.केटा :
मञ्जुरीनामा देउन मैच्याङ , तिम्रै वरिपरि बस्न लाई २
डाहा त गर्ने दुनियाँ सामु , मायाको डोरी कस्न लाई २
दिलै खोली मन साटेर , मलाई छेउ कुना बस्न देउ १
शंकले होईन मायाले , यो च्याङ्बालाई स्विकारि देउ २

१.केटी :
राजिनामा पेश गर्छु म त , च्याङ्बाको यस्तो पारा लाई
सोमात भन्ने केही छैन , तामासा देखाउँछ सारा लाई
किन पो बस्नु मेरो छेउ , यो झ्यान नभै नामसारी 
खुस्केको होकि त्यो दिमाग , शंका नै लाग्छ गरि गरि

२.केटा :
च्याङ्बाको कुरा सुन मैच्याङ , मायामा गरौं गठ्बन्धन २
धर्ती फाट्ला आकाश खस्ला , छुट्दैन मायाको यो बन्धन २
पागल उपाधी दिन्छ यहाँ , मायाले मनको कुरा बोल्दा १
घुम्स्याई नराख त्यो माया , के नै जान्छ र दिल खोल्दा २
२.केटी :
रंग न ढंग को कुरा गर्छ , छेउ टुप्पो केही नमिल्ने 
दश बित्ते मान्छे तीस बित्ते फुँई , कसरी मैले पत्याउने
बाउ बाजेको इज्जत नफाल , आफ्नो छैन भन्दामा 
सोचेको होला मीठो कुरा गरि , मैच्याङ्लाई पारौंला फान्दामा



३.केटा :
आत्मालाई साक्षी राखेर मैच्याङ , मायाको तामसुक लेखौंला २
दफा दफामा मायाको बयान , मायाकै कानुन मानौँला २
जान अन्जानमा गल्ती भए , भोग्नलाई तयार छु सजाय १
इमान्दारी मेहनेती , च्याङ्बाको अर्को परिचय २

३.केटी :
नापीको हाकिम भन्दा जान्ने , कुराको कित्ता गर्न लाई
मायाको लाल पुर्जामा ,दम छैन विश्वास भर्न लाई
बेहोरा हेर्दा कैदि को जस्तो , यो बानी छिट्टै सुध्रियोस 
न्यायाधीश ले जस्तो मैले फेरि , बयान लिनु नपरोस् 


----------------------------------------------------
►TIMESTAMPS 
0:00 - Story  
0:00 - Song Start
0:00 - Last Story
0:00 - Credits Parts
----------------------------------------------------

✍️🎼 Lyrics / Music / Arrange : Bishwo Dong
🎚 Mixing / Mastering : Dipesh Pradhan (Deep Studio)
🎙 Studio : Dong Studio
🤝 Supporter : Lal Dhoj Tamang

© All Rights Reserved

🔔 Subscribe for more new Tamang Selo songs
👍 Like | Comment | Share

#ManjurinamaDeunaMaichyang
#BishwoDong
#AlinaYonjan
#TamangSeloSong
#NewSeloSong2026
#NepaliSong
#TamangSong
#DongStudio
----------------------------------------------------
१.केटा :
मञ्जुरीनामा देउन मैच्याङ , तिम्रै वरिपरि बस्न लाई २
डाहा त गर्ने दुनियाँ सामु , मायाको डोरी कस्न लाई २
दिलै खोली मन साटेर , मलाई छेउ कुना बस्न देउ १
शंकले होईन मायाले , यो च्याङ्बालाई स्विकारि देउ २

१.केटी :
राजिनामा पेश गर्छु म त , च्याङ्बाको यस्तो पारा लाई
सोमात भन्ने केही छैन , तामासा देखाउँछ सारा लाई
किन पो बस्नु मेरो छेउ , यो झ्यान नभै नामसारी 
खुस्केको होकि त्यो दिमाग , शंका नै लाग्छ गरि गरि

२.केटा :
च्याङ्बाको कुरा सुन मैच्याङ , मायामा गरौं गठ्बन्धन २
धर्ती फाट्ला आकाश खस्ला , छुट्दैन मायाको यो बन्धन २
पागल उपाधी दिन्छ यहाँ , मायाले मनको कुरा बोल्दा १
घुम्स्याई नराख त्यो माया , के नै जान्छ र दिल खोल्दा २
२.केटी :
रंग न ढंग को कुरा गर्छ , छेउ टुप्पो केही नमिल्ने 
दश बित्ते मान्छे तीस बित्ते फुँई , कसरी मैले पत्याउने
बाउ बाजेको इज्जत नफाल , आफ्नो छैन भन्दामा 
सोचेको होला मीठो कुरा गरि , मैच्याङ्लाई पारौंला फान्दामा



३.केटा :
आत्मालाई साक्षी राखेर मैच्याङ , मायाको तामसुक लेखौंला २
दफा दफामा मायाको बयान , मायाकै कानुन मानौँला २
जान अन्जानमा गल्ती भए , भोग्नलाई तयार छु सजाय १
इमान्दारी मेहनेती , च्याङ्बाको अर्को परिचय २

३.केटी :
नापीको हाकिम भन्दा जान्ने , कुराको कित्ता गर्न लाई
मायाको लाल पुर्जामा ,दम छैन विश्वास भर्न लाई
बेहोरा हेर्दा कैदि को जस्तो , यो बानी छिट्टै सुध्रियोस 
न्यायाधीश ले जस्तो मैले फेरि , बयान लिनु नपरोस्

snippet.title: Shawn Mendes - Treat You Better (Lyrics)
snippet.description:
Shawn Mendes - Treat You Better
Stream / Download "Treat You Better": https://music.youtube.com/watch?v=lY2yjAdbvdQ

Treat You Better Lyrics
I won't lie to you
I know he's just not right for you
And you can tell me if I'm off, but I see it on your face
When you say that he's the one that you want
And you're spending all your time in this wrong situation
And anytime you want it to stop
I know I can treat you better than he can
And any girl like you deserves a gentleman
Tell me why are we wasting time on all your wasted crying
When you should be with me instead?
I know I can treat you better
Better than he can
I'll stop time for you
The second you say you'd like me to
I just wanna give you the loving that you're missing
Baby, just to wake up with you
Would be everything I need, and this could be so different
Tell me what you want to do
'Cause I know I can treat you better than he can
And any girl like you deserves a gentleman
Tell me why are we wasting time on all your wasted crying
When you should be with me instead?
I know I can treat you better
Better than he can
Better than he can
Give me a sign, take my hand, we'll be fine
Promise I won't let you down
Just know that you don't have to do this alone
Promise I'll never let you down
'Cause I know I can treat you better than he can
And any girl like you deserves a gentleman
Tell me why are we wasting time on all your wasted crying
When you should be with me instead?
I know I can treat you better
Better than he can, oh
Better than he can
Better than he can

hi.title: मेक्सिको बनाम दक्षिण अफ्रीका 11/06/2026 - वर्ल्ड कप 2026 | EFootball 2026
hi.description:
ईफुटबॉल पीईएस 2021 सीज़न अपडेट और बीएमपीईएस वी15 पैच द्वारा संचालित इस यथार्थवादी सिमुलेशन में मैक्सिको बनाम दक्षिण अफ्रीका के एक और रोमांचक वर्चुअल फुटबॉल मुकाबले के लिए तैयार हो जाइए।

आनंद लीजिए: 🔥 यथार्थवादी गेमप्ले और खिलाड़ियों की गतिविधियां 🎮 अपडेटेड टीमें और बेहतर ग्राफिक्स 📺 1080p अल्ट्रा एचडी में 60FPS पर शानदार एक्शन ⚽ असली फुटबॉल प्रसारण से प्रेरित मैच का माहौल

यह वीडियो हमारी फुटबॉल सिमुलेशन श्रृंखला का हिस्सा है, जिसे वर्चुअल मैचों के शौकीन फुटबॉल प्रशंसकों और उनके मनोरंजन के लिए बनाया गया है।

⚠️ अस्वीकरण: दिखाया गया कंटेंट पीईएस 2021 के अंदर एक सिमुलेटेड मैच है और यह किसी आधिकारिक वास्तविक खेल का प्रतिनिधित्व नहीं करता है।

👍 अगर आपको सिमुलेशन पसंद आया तो वीडियो को लाइक करें। 🔔 अधिक फुटबॉल कंटेंट और वर्चुअल मैच अनुभवों के लिए गेमर बीआर को सब्सक्राइब करें। 💬 कमेंट में अपनी भविष्यवाणी लिखें: सऊदी अरब या सेनेगल में से कौन जीतेगा?


#eFootball2021 #PES2021 #GamerBR #FootballSimulation #VirtualMatch

ar.description:
استعدوا لمواجهة كروية افتراضية مثيرة أخرى تجمع بين المكسيك وجنوب أفريقيا في محاكاة واقعية مدعومة بتحديث موسم eFootball PES 2021 مع رقعة BMPES V15.

استمتعوا بـ: 🔥 أسلوب لعب وحركات لاعبين واقعية 🎮 فرق محدثة ورسومات محسّنة 📺 حركة سلسة بمعدل 60 إطارًا في الثانية بدقة 1080p فائقة الوضوح ⚽ أجواء مباراة مستوحاة من البث المباشر لمباريات كرة القدم الحقيقية

هذا الفيديو جزء من سلسلة محاكاة كرة القدم، صُممت خصيصًا للترفيه ولعشاق كرة القدم الذين يعشقون المباريات الافتراضية.

⚠️ تنويه: المحتوى المعروض عبارة عن مباراة محاكاة داخل PES 2021 ولا يُمثل مباراة رسمية حقيقية.

👍 اضغطوا إعجاب إذا أعجبتكم المحاكاة. 🔔 اشتركوا في قناة Gamer BR للمزيد من محتوى كرة القدم وتجارب المباريات الافتراضية. 💬 شاركونا توقعاتكم في التعليقات: من سيفوز، السعودية أم السنغال؟

pa.title: ਮੈਕਸੀਕੋ ਬਨਾਮ ਦੱਖਣੀ ਅਫਰੀਕਾ 11/06/2026 - ਵਰਲਡ ਕੱਪ 2026 | EFootball 2026
pa.description:
BMPES V15 ਪੈਚ ਦੇ ਨਾਲ eFootball PES 2021 ਸੀਜ਼ਨ ਅੱਪਡੇਟ ਦੁਆਰਾ ਸੰਚਾਲਿਤ ਇੱਕ ਯਥਾਰਥਵਾਦੀ ਸਿਮੂਲੇਸ਼ਨ ਵਿੱਚ ਮੈਕਸੀਕੋ ਬਨਾਮ ਦੱਖਣੀ ਅਫਰੀਕਾ ਨੂੰ ਦਰਸਾਉਂਦੇ ਇੱਕ ਹੋਰ ਦਿਲਚਸਪ ਵਰਚੁਅਲ ਫੁੱਟਬਾਲ ਮੁਕਾਬਲੇ ਲਈ ਤਿਆਰ ਹੋ ਜਾਓ।

ਆਨੰਦ ਮਾਣੋ: 🔥 ਯਥਾਰਥਵਾਦੀ ਗੇਮਪਲੇ ਅਤੇ ਖਿਡਾਰੀਆਂ ਦੀਆਂ ਹਰਕਤਾਂ 🎮 ਅੱਪਡੇਟ ਕੀਤੀਆਂ ਟੀਮਾਂ ਅਤੇ ਬਿਹਤਰ ਗ੍ਰਾਫਿਕਸ 📺 1080p ਅਲਟਰਾ HD ਵਿੱਚ ਨਿਰਵਿਘਨ 60FPS ਐਕਸ਼ਨ ⚽ ਅਸਲ ਫੁੱਟਬਾਲ ਪ੍ਰਸਾਰਣ ਤੋਂ ਪ੍ਰੇਰਿਤ ਮੈਚ ਮਾਹੌਲ

ਇਹ ਵੀਡੀਓ ਸਾਡੀ ਫੁੱਟਬਾਲ ਸਿਮੂਲੇਸ਼ਨ ਲੜੀ ਦਾ ਹਿੱਸਾ ਹੈ, ਜੋ ਮਨੋਰੰਜਨ ਅਤੇ ਵਰਚੁਅਲ ਮੈਚਾਂ ਨੂੰ ਪਸੰਦ ਕਰਨ ਵਾਲੇ ਫੁੱਟਬਾਲ ਪ੍ਰਸ਼ੰਸਕਾਂ ਲਈ ਬਣਾਈ ਗਈ ਹੈ।

⚠️ ਬੇਦਾਅਵਾ: ਦਿਖਾਈ ਗਈ ਸਮੱਗਰੀ PES 2021 ਦੇ ਅੰਦਰ ਇੱਕ ਸਿਮੂਲੇਟਡ ਮੈਚ ਹੈ ਅਤੇ ਇੱਕ ਅਧਿਕਾਰਤ ਅਸਲ-ਜੀਵਨ ਗੇਮ ਨੂੰ ਦਰਸਾਉਂਦੀ ਨਹੀਂ ਹੈ।

👍 ਜੇਕਰ ਤੁਸੀਂ ਸਿਮੂਲੇਸ਼ਨ ਦਾ ਆਨੰਦ ਮਾਣਿਆ ਹੈ ਤਾਂ ਵੀਡੀਓ ਨੂੰ ਪਸੰਦ ਕਰੋ। 🔔 ਹੋਰ ਫੁੱਟਬਾਲ ਸਮੱਗਰੀ ਅਤੇ ਵਰਚੁਅਲ ਮੈਚ ਅਨੁਭਵਾਂ ਲਈ ਗੇਮਰ BR ਨੂੰ ਸਬਸਕ੍ਰਾਈਬ ਕਰੋ। 💬 ਟਿੱਪਣੀਆਂ ਵਿੱਚ ਆਪਣੀ ਭਵਿੱਖਬਾਣੀ ਛੱਡੋ: ਕੌਣ ਜਿੱਤੇਗਾ, ਸਾਊਦੀ ਅਰਬ ਜਾਂ ਸੇਨੇਗਲ?

#eFootball2021 #PES2021 #GamerBR #FootballSimulation #VirtualMatch

ta.title: மெக்சிகோ vs தென்னாப்பிரிக்கா 11/06/2026 - உலகக் கோப்பை 2026 | EFootball 2026
ta.description:
BMPES V15 பேட்ச்சுடன் கூடிய eFootball PES 2021 சீசன் அப்டேட்டின் மூலம் இயக்கப்படும் ஒரு யதார்த்தமான சிமுலேஷனில், மெக்சிகோ மற்றும் தென்னாப்பிரிக்கா அணிகள் மோதும் மற்றொரு விறுவிறுப்பான மெய்நிகர் கால்பந்துப் போட்டிக்குத் தயாராகுங்கள்.

மகிழுங்கள்: 🔥 யதார்த்தமான விளையாட்டு மற்றும் வீரர்களின் நகர்வுகள் 🎮 புதுப்பிக்கப்பட்ட அணிகள் மற்றும் மேம்படுத்தப்பட்ட கிராபிக்ஸ் 📺 1080p அல்ட்ரா HDயில் மென்மையான 60FPS செயல்பாடு ⚽ உண்மையான கால்பந்து ஒளிபரப்புகளால் ஈர்க்கப்பட்ட ஒரு போட்டிச் சூழல்

இந்த வீடியோ, பொழுதுபோக்கு மற்றும் மெய்நிகர் போட்டிகளை விரும்பும் கால்பந்து ரசிகர்களுக்காக உருவாக்கப்பட்ட எங்களின் கால்பந்து சிமுலேஷன் தொடரின் ஒரு பகுதியாகும்.

⚠️ மறுப்பு: இங்கு காட்டப்படும் உள்ளடக்கம் PES 2021-க்குள் உருவகப்படுத்தப்பட்ட ஒரு போட்டியாகும், இது ஒரு அதிகாரப்பூர்வமான நிஜ வாழ்க்கைப் போட்டியைக் குறிக்கவில்லை.

👍 இந்த சிமுலேஷனை நீங்கள் ரசித்திருந்தால் வீடியோவை லைக் செய்யுங்கள். 🔔 மேலும் பல கால்பந்து உள்ளடக்கங்கள் மற்றும் மெய்நிகர் போட்டி அனுபவங்களுக்காக Gamer BR-க்கு சப்ஸ்கிரைப் செய்யுங்கள். 💬 உங்கள் கணிப்பை கமெண்ட்களில் பதிவிடுங்கள்: சவுதி அரேபியா அல்லது செனகல், யார் வெற்றி பெறுவார்கள்?

#eFootball2021 #PES2021 #GamerBR #FootballSimulation #VirtualMatch

uk.title: Мексика проти Південної Африки 11.06.2026 - Чемпіонат світу 2026 | EFootball 2026

Це відео є частиною нашої серії футбольних симуляторів, створеної для розваг та футбольних фанатів, які люблять віртуальні матчі.

te.title: మెక్సికో vs దక్షిణాఫ్రికా 11/06/2026 - వరల్డ్ కప్ 2026 | EFootball 2026
te.description:
BMPES V15 ప్యాచ్‌తో కూడిన eFootball PES 2021 సీజన్ అప్‌డేట్ ద్వారా శక్తివంతమైన వాస్తవిక సిమ్యులేషన్‌లో, మెక్సికో మరియు దక్షిణాఫ్రికా మధ్య జరిగే మరో ఉత్కంఠభరితమైన వర్చువల్ ఫుట్‌బాల్ పోరుకు సిద్ధమవ్వండి.

ఆస్వాదించండి: 🔥 వాస్తవిక గేమ్‌ప్లే మరియు ఆటగాళ్ల కదలికలు 🎮 అప్‌డేట్ చేయబడిన జట్లు మరియు మెరుగైన గ్రాఫిక్స్ 📺 1080p అల్ట్రా HDలో సున్నితమైన 60FPS యాక్షన్ ⚽ నిజమైన ఫుట్‌బాల్ ప్రసారాల నుండి ప్రేరణ పొందిన మ్యాచ్ వాతావరణం

ఈ వీడియో, వినోదం కోసం మరియు వర్చువల్ మ్యాచ్‌లను ఇష్టపడే ఫుట్‌బాల్ అభిమానుల కోసం రూపొందించిన మా ఫుట్‌బాల్ సిమ్యులేషన్ సిరీస్‌లో ఒక భాగం.

⚠️ నిరాకరణ: ఇక్కడ చూపిన కంటెంట్ PES 2021 లోపల సిమ్యులేట్ చేయబడిన మ్యాచ్ మాత్రమే మరియు ఇది అధికారిక నిజ జీవిత గేమ్‌కు ప్రాతినిధ్యం వహించదు.

👍 మీకు ఈ సిమ్యులేషన్ నచ్చితే వీడియోను లైక్ చేయండి. 🔔 మరిన్ని ఫుట్‌బాల్ కంటెంట్ మరియు వర్చువల్ మ్యాచ్ అనుభవాల కోసం గేమర్ BRకు సబ్‌స్క్రైబ్ చేయండి. 💬 మీ అంచనాను కామెంట్లలో తెలియజేయండి: సౌదీ అరేబియా లేదా సెనెగల్, ఎవరు గెలుస్తారు?

ko.title: 멕시코 vs 남아프리카공화국 2026년 6월 11일 - 2026 월드컵 | EFootball 2026
ko.description:
eFootball PES 2021 시즌 업데이트와 BMPES V15 패치로 구현된 실감나는 시뮬레이션에서 멕시코와 남아프리카공화국의 흥미진진한 가상 축구 경기를 다시 한번 경험해 보세요!

다음과 같은 기능을 즐겨보세요: 🔥 실감나는 게임플레이와 선수 움직임 🎮 업데이트된 팀과 향상된 그래픽 📺 1080p Ultra HD 해상도에서 부드러운 60FPS ⚽ 실제 축구 중계에서 영감을 받은 경기장 분위기

이 영상은 가상 경기를 좋아하는 축구 팬들을 위해 제작된 축구 시뮬레이션 시리즈의 일부입니다.

⚠️ 면책 조항: 본 영상은 PES 2021 시뮬레이션 경기이며, 실제 경기를 나타내는 것이 아닙니다.

👍 시뮬레이션이 마음에 드셨다면 좋아요를 눌러주세요. 🔔 더 많은 축구 콘텐츠와 가상 경기 영상을 보시려면 Gamer BR 채널을 구독해주세요. 💬 댓글에 여러분의 예상을 남겨주세요: 사우디아라비아와 세네갈 중 누가 승리할까요?

ml.title: മെക്സിക്കോ vs ദക്ഷിണാഫ്രിക്ക 11/06/2026 - ലോകകപ്പ് 2026 | EFootball 2026
ml.description:
ഇ-ഫുട്ബോൾ PES 2021 സീസൺ അപ്‌ഡേറ്റ് നൽകുന്ന റിയലിസ്റ്റിക് സിമുലേഷനിൽ മെക്സിക്കോ vs ദക്ഷിണാഫ്രിക്ക മത്സരങ്ങൾ അവതരിപ്പിക്കുന്ന മറ്റൊരു ആവേശകരമായ വെർച്വൽ ഫുട്ബോൾ ഷോഡൗണിനായി BMPES V15 പാച്ച് ഉപയോഗിച്ച് തയ്യാറാകൂ.

ആസ്വദിക്കൂ: 🔥 റിയലിസ്റ്റിക് ഗെയിംപ്ലേയും കളിക്കാരുടെ ചലനങ്ങളും 🎮 അപ്‌ഡേറ്റ് ചെയ്‌ത ടീമുകളും മെച്ചപ്പെട്ട ഗ്രാഫിക്സും 📺 1080p അൾട്രാ HD-യിൽ സുഗമമായ 60FPS ആക്ഷൻ ⚽ യഥാർത്ഥ ഫുട്ബോൾ പ്രക്ഷേപണങ്ങളിൽ നിന്ന് പ്രചോദനം ഉൾക്കൊണ്ട ഒരു മത്സര അന്തരീക്ഷം

ഈ വീഡിയോ ഞങ്ങളുടെ ഫുട്ബോൾ സിമുലേഷൻ പരമ്പരയുടെ ഭാഗമാണ്, വെർച്വൽ മത്സരങ്ങൾ ഇഷ്ടപ്പെടുന്ന വിനോദത്തിനും ഫുട്ബോൾ ആരാധകർക്കും വേണ്ടി സൃഷ്ടിച്ചതാണ്.

⚠️ നിരാകരണം: കാണിച്ചിരിക്കുന്ന ഉള്ളടക്കം PES 2021-ലെ ഒരു സിമുലേറ്റഡ് മത്സരമാണ്, ഇത് ഒരു ഔദ്യോഗിക യഥാർത്ഥ ജീവിത ഗെയിമിനെ പ്രതിനിധീകരിക്കുന്നില്ല.

👍 സിമുലേഷൻ ആസ്വദിച്ചെങ്കിൽ വീഡിയോ ലൈക്ക് ചെയ്യുക. 🔔 കൂടുതൽ ഫുട്ബോൾ ഉള്ളടക്കത്തിനും വെർച്വൽ മത്സര അനുഭവങ്ങൾക്കും ഗെയിമർ BR സബ്‌സ്‌ക്രൈബ് ചെയ്യുക. 💬 നിങ്ങളുടെ പ്രവചനം അഭിപ്രായങ്ങളിൽ ഇടുക: ആരാണ് വിജയിക്കുക, സൗദി അറേബ്യയോ സെനഗലോ?

#eFootball2021 #PES2021 #GamerBR #FootballSimulation #VirtualMatch

bn.title: মেক্সিকো বনাম দক্ষিণ আফ্রিকা ১১/০৬/২০২৬ - বিশ্বকাপ ২০২৬ | ই-ফুটবল ২০২৬
bn.description:
eFootball PES 2021 সিজন আপডেট এবং BMPES V15 প্যাচ দ্বারা চালিত একটি বাস্তবসম্মত সিমুলেশনে মেক্সিকো বনাম দক্ষিণ আফ্রিকার আরেকটি উত্তেজনাপূর্ণ ভার্চুয়াল ফুটবল লড়াইয়ের জন্য প্রস্তুত হন।

উপভোগ করুন: 🔥 বাস্তবসম্মত গেমপ্লে এবং খেলোয়াড়দের মুভমেন্ট 🎮 আপডেট করা দল এবং উন্নত গ্রাফিক্স 📺 1080p আল্ট্রা এইচডি-তে মসৃণ 60FPS অ্যাকশন ⚽ আসল ফুটবল সম্প্রচার থেকে অনুপ্রাণিত ম্যাচের পরিবেশ

এই ভিডিওটি আমাদের ফুটবল সিমুলেশন সিরিজের একটি অংশ, যা বিনোদন এবং ভার্চুয়াল ম্যাচ ভালোবাসেন এমন ফুটবল ভক্তদের জন্য তৈরি করা হয়েছে।

⚠️ ডিসক্লেইমার: এখানে দেখানো কন্টেন্টটি PES 2021-এর ভেতরের একটি সিমুলেটেড ম্যাচ এবং এটি কোনো অফিশিয়াল বাস্তব খেলার প্রতিনিধিত্ব করে না।

👍 সিমুলেশনটি ভালো লাগলে ভিডিওটি লাইক করুন। 🔔 আরও ফুটবল কন্টেন্ট এবং ভার্চুয়াল ম্যাচের অভিজ্ঞতার জন্য Gamer BR-এ সাবস্ক্রাইব করুন। 💬 কমেন্টে আপনার ভবিষ্যদ্বাণী জানান: কে জিতবে, সৌদি আরব নাকি সেনেগাল?

#eFootball2021 #PES2021 #GamerBR #FootballSimulation #VirtualMatch

snippet.title: [ WATCHPARTY ] 2026 PMGO S1 Main Event | Grand Finals | LAST DAY
snippet.description:
➡️ Membership Link: 
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC3IAnSKHhS1CFcxkmHUfFFw/join

➡️ Nepali Superchat Link: 
https://cr8.rs/@rashmay_casts
( This Will display your Message & Amount you donated on the Screen )

➡️ Follow me On instagram: 
https://www.instagram.com/rashmay_/

➡️ Join "OP" Instagram Broadcast Channel:
https://www.instagram.com/channel/AbZ5dS8d0aiI85Vk/

________________________________________________________________________________

2026 PUBG MOBILE GLOBAL OPEN Season 1 ko Main Event ab aafno charam binduma pugisakeko chha – Grand Finals!

Duniya bharika 10 lakh bhanda badhi kheladiharu yo manchma pugna chahanthe. Tara keval thorai teamharule matra aafno sip, mehenat ra nirantar pradarshan dwara yo sthaan hasil gareka chhan. 16 team, 2 din, ra eutai champion. Yo rosterma raheka harek teamle aafno thau sangharsha ra mehenat bata kamai gareko ho. Kasaiko lagi sajilo bato thiyena, kasaiko lagi upahar thiyena. Yaha keval sabai bhanda uttam teamharu champion banna ko lagi aamne-saamne hunechhan.

🏆 2026 PUBG MOBILE GLOBAL OPEN Season 1 | Main Event

📋 FORMAT

Group Stage
• 32 team 16–16 team ko 2 samuha ma vibhajit
• Kul 2 din (pratyek samuha ko lagi 1 din)
• Samagra Ranking 1–6 → Grand Finals
• Samagra Ranking 7–14 → Survival Stage
• Samagra Ranking 15–16 → Eliminated

Survival Stage
• Samagra Ranking 1–4 → Grand Finals
• Samagra Ranking 5–16 → Eliminated

Grand Finals
• 16 team — 2 din, pratyek din 6 match

🔥 SMASH RULE (Day 2 ma lagu hunechha)

SMASH Rule trophy jitne sabai bhanda romanchak tarika ho. Tara kasari?

• Day 1 ko Overall Ranking #1 team ko point +10 = Match Point Threshold
• Day 2 ma threshold pura garepachi arko match jitnuparcha title jitna
• Yadi kunai team le SMASH pura garna saken bhane, sabai bhanda dherai overall point bhayeko team vijeta hunchha

🗓 Tournament Talika

• Group Stage: June 2–3
• Survival Stage: June 4
• Grand Finals: June 6–7

💰 Kul Prize Pool: $500,000

🏅 Grand Final Teams:
4T
721
Aur
BOOM
BTR
EA
FL
FURIA
GEEK
goat
GSTR
HORAA
PNDM
S2G
TT
ULF.
🗺 Aajako Map Rotation
• Match 1: Rondo
• Match 2: Erangel
• Match 3: Erangel
• Match 4: Erangel
• Match 5: Miramar
• Match 6: Miramar

📍 Venue: Tennis Indoor Stadium Senayan



#PMGO2026 #PUBGMESPORTS #PUBGMOBILE #pubgmnp

snippet.title: Hunna Bhaneki |हुन्‍न भनेकी | Shakti Kumar Godar & Asmita Dallakoti | New Nepali Lok Song 2083/2026
snippet.description:
#asmitadallakoti #shaktikumar #newlokdohori #hunnabhaneki #batojaamhunchha #asmitadallakotinewsong #newnepalilokdohorisong #lokgeet #latestsong #newsong #nepalimusic #shaktikumargodarnewsong #newnepalivideos 

Asmita Dallakoti Presents:- 

----------------------------------------
🎶 Audio Credits:- 

♬ Vocal:- Shakti Kumar Godar & Asmita Dallakoti


♬ Lyrics | Music:- Shakti Kumar Godar


♬ Arranger:- Sunil Pariyar


♬ Mixing | Mastering:- Khadak Bajurali


♬ Studio:- Malashree


-----------------------------------------

🎬️ Video Credits:- 

🎬️ Direction | Choreography:- Jerry Bhandari


🎬️ Cast:- Shakti Kumar Godar & Asmita Dallakoti


🎬️ Camera | Drone;- Rajesh Ghimire


🎬️ Edit | Color:- Prabin Bhatta 


🎬️ MUA:- Sonika Gajmer

🎬️ Production/Assit Direction:- Amar Rawal

🎬️ Post Production:- Prashubh Station

Special Thanks:- Baburam Bohora

Thego ( Keta | Keti)
Hunna Bhaneki Mukhle Hunna Bhaneni Manle Maya Bunna Bhaneki

Keta
Trisulima machhi nachyo harsa lahora
Manchhe sani dekhe kati barsa lahora

Keti
Aaure bahure pachhi laune dekhe yatiko
Thaha chhaina ra umer sodhna hunna ketiko

Ramrile ta bhau nai khanchhan jalma parula
Aachhiu khaya bachhiu khaya jhuse barula

Hiro vaya sochdo hola jokker jastole
Balai dina herda pani kasto kasto le

Umeraima bihe garera nalaya arule
Kura katlan sathivai ra gaule harule

Fakaunani kati bidhhi raichha janeko
Arka chhori xya yasari kina taneko

Shyal ni ghorle baisama re bujha nani ho
Gala chauri pare pachhi kasle laniho

Facebook tiktok charai tira merai naam hunchha
Ma batoma niske vani batai jaam hunchha

Timlai malai dekhe pachhi juna tarale
Big fan hajur vandai comment garchhan sarale

Paune chhainau aashu jharna choli fatauna
Kati sarai sipalu hau keti patauna

localized.description:
#asmitadallakoti #shaktikumar #newlokdohori #hunnabhaneki #batojaamhunchha #asmitadallakotinewsong #newnepalilokdohorisong #lokgeet #latestsong #newsong #nepalimusic #shaktikumargodarnewsong #newnepalivideos 

Asmita Dallakoti Presents:- 

----------------------------------------
🎶 Audio Credits:- 

♬ Vocal:- Shakti Kumar Godar & Asmita Dallakoti


♬ Lyrics | Music:- Shakti Kumar Godar


♬ Arranger:- Sunil Pariyar


♬ Mixing | Mastering:- Khadak Bajurali


♬ Studio:- Malashree


-----------------------------------------

🎬️ Video Credits:- 

🎬️ Direction | Choreography:- Jerry Bhandari


🎬️ Cast:- Shakti Kumar Godar & Asmita Dallakoti


🎬️ Camera | Drone;- Rajesh Ghimire


🎬️ Edit | Color:- Prabin Bhatta 


🎬️ MUA:- Sonika Gajmer

🎬️ Production/Assit Direction:- Amar Rawal

🎬️ Post Production:- Prashubh Station

Special Thanks:- Baburam Bohora

Thego ( Keta | Keti)
Hunna Bhaneki Mukhle Hunna Bhaneni Manle Maya Bunna Bhaneki

Keta
Trisulima machhi nachyo harsa lahora
Manchhe sani dekhe kati barsa lahora

Keti
Aaure bahure pachhi laune dekhe yatiko
Thaha chhaina ra umer sodhna hunna ketiko

Ramrile ta bhau nai khanchhan jalma parula
Aachhiu khaya bachhiu khaya jhuse barula

Hiro vaya sochdo hola jokker jastole
Balai dina herda pani kasto kasto le

Umeraima bihe garera nalaya arule
Kura katlan sathivai ra gaule harule

Fakaunani kati bidhhi raichha janeko
Arka chhori xya yasari kina taneko

Shyal ni ghorle baisama re bujha nani ho
Gala chauri pare pachhi kasle laniho

Facebook tiktok charai tira merai naam hunchha
Ma batoma niske vani batai jaam hunchha

Timlai malai dekhe pachhi juna tarale
Big fan hajur vandai comment garchhan sarale

Paune chhainau aashu jharna choli fatauna
Kati sarai sipalu hau keti patauna

© Asmita Dallakoti, 2026
All Rights Reserved
---------------------------------------------
Stream & download my songs on:- 
Spotify:- https://spoti.fi/3px7O1R
Apple Music:- https://apple.co/3VUnk3S
Deezer:- https://bit.ly/3o2r8TY
Amazon Music:- https://amzn.to/3O3LU0k
Tidal:- https://bit.ly/3pDBUjZ
Soundcloud:- https://bit.ly/3Mi7GMu

Social Links:-

let the worries fade away o

haye re haye re haye haye re
haye re haye re haye haye re

Bannke Nikli kyu

haye re haye re haye haye re

Chann v terian siftan karda

Patlo Banke agg hai firdi
Bijli wangu saade te girdi
cock-tail to vad ke saroor a
matthe te jedi latt a girdi

Aye this friendship
aint meant for
just a drink or two
we're together
aur koi
chahiye hi kyun

haye re haye re haye haye re

haye re haye re haye haye re

snippet.title: Aankha Mari Gorile Nepali Song
snippet.description:
📌 Description
"Aankha Mari Gorile Nepali Song presented by Manko Saathi Music, filled with pure emotions, deep love feelings, and heart-touching melody. This song expresses the message that in a world full of people, the heart chooses only you —Aankha Mari Gorile Nepali Song. meaningful lyrics, and beautiful composition make this track perfect for romantic vibes, daily listening, and love memories.
#AankhaMariGorileNepaliSong#NewNepaliSong2026 #NepaliFolkLoveSong #NepaliLoveSong2026 #NewNepaliFolkSong #NepaliSong2026 #NepaliRomanticSong #FolkLoveSong #NepaliMusic #LoveSongNepal#femalevoice 

If you’ve ever loved someone with your whole heart, this song will touch your soul. ❤️
Like, Comment and Share if this song reminds you of someone special.

🎮 About the Channel:  
SujalisLive is a Hindi gaming channel where I upload entertaining and story-driven videos on Roblox. Right now, I'm focused on **Roblox Blox Fruits** — one of the most popular One Piece-inspired games on Roblox, where you fight bosses, level up, and become the strongest player.  

Whether you're a beginner or a pro, you'll find funny moments, grinding tips, and epic battles here — all in Hinglish. Join the journey as I build a loyal gaming audience for GTA 6 and beyond!

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━ 
🎮 চ্যানেল সম্পর্কে: 
সুজালিসলাইভ একটি হিন্দি গেমিং চ্যানেল, যেখানে আমি রোবলক্সের উপর বিনোদনমূলক এবং গল্প-নির্ভর ভিডিও আপলোড করি। এই মুহূর্তে, আমি **রোবলক্স ব্লক্স ফ্রুটস**-এর উপর মনোযোগ দিচ্ছি — এটি রোবলক্সের অন্যতম জনপ্রিয় ওয়ান পিস-অনুপ্রাণিত একটি গেম, যেখানে আপনি বসদের সাথে লড়াই করেন, লেভেল আপ করেন এবং সবচেয়ে শক্তিশালী খেলোয়াড় হয়ে ওঠেন। 

আপনি নতুন বা অভিজ্ঞ, যাই হোন না কেন, এখানে আপনি মজার মুহূর্ত, গ্রাইন্ডিং টিপস এবং দুর্দান্ত সব লড়াই খুঁজে পাবেন — সবই হিংলাশে। জিটিএ ৬ এবং তার পরবর্তী গেমগুলোর জন্য একটি অনুগত গেমিং দর্শক তৈরি করার এই যাত্রায় আমার সাথে যোগ দিন!

snippet.title: Adhuro Sapana - Salon&TheYubal | Official Music Video
snippet.description:
Adhuro Sapana
Performed by: Salon Bal Tamang

“Adhuro Sapana” is an emotional song about love, trust, and betrayal. It tells the story of a boy who builds his dreams around a girl, only to be left heartbroken when she betrays him. In the end, all his dreams remain incomplete, reflecting the pain of broken trust and unfinished love.

Audio Credits
 • Vocal / Lyrics / Composition: Salon Bal Tamang

https://www.instagram.com/salon_tmg314

 • Mix / Master / Produced By: Saswot Shrestha (Omniphonics Production)

https://www.instagram.com/omniphonics.studio

hi.title: मैंने JACK के साथ PALWORLD में पहले बॉस को हरा दिया 😱
hi.description:
नए वीडियो के लिए सब्सक्राइब करें
🤗 मुझे इंस्टाग्राम पर फॉलो करें: ​https://www.instagram.com/gamerfleetog/

आशा है आपको वीडियो पसंद आया होगा। अगर पसंद आया तो कृपया लाइक और शेयर करें।

कॉपीराइट अधिनियम 1976 की धारा 107 के तहत कॉपीराइट अस्वीकरण: आलोचना, टिप्पणी, समाचार रिपोर्टिंग, शिक्षण, छात्रवृत्ति, शिक्षा और अनुसंधान जैसे उद्देश्यों के लिए "उचित उपयोग" की अनुमति दी गई है।

उचित उपयोग कॉपीराइट कानूनों द्वारा अनुमत एक ऐसा उपयोग है जो अन्यथा उल्लंघनकारी हो सकता है।

ko.title: 잭으로 팔월드 첫 번째 보스를 물리쳤어요! 😱
ko.description:
새 영상이 올라오면 구독해주세요!
🤗 인스타그램도 팔로우해주세요: https://www.instagram.com/gamerfleetog/

영상이 마음에 드셨다면 좋아요와 공유 부탁드립니다.

본 영상은 1976년 저작권법 제107조에 따라 비판, 논평, 뉴스 보도, 교육, 학술 연구 등의 목적으로 "공정 사용"이 허용됨을 명시합니다.

공정 사용은 저작권법에 의해 허용되는 사용으로, 그렇지 않을 경우 저작권 침해에 해당될 수 있습니다.

pl.title: POKONAŁEM PIERWSZEGO BOSS W PALWORLD Z JACKIEM 😱
pl.description:
Subskrybuj, aby oglądać nowe filmy
🤗 Obserwuj mnie na Instagramie: https://www.instagram.com/gamerfleetog/

Mam nadzieję, że film Ci się spodobał, jeśli tak, polub go i udostępnij.

Zastrzeżenie dotyczące praw autorskich, zgodnie z sekcją 107 Ustawy o prawach autorskich z 1976 r., zezwala na „dozwolony użytek” w celach takich jak krytyka, komentarz, relacje prasowe, nauczanie, stypendia, edukacja i badania.

Dozwolony użytek to użycie dozwolone przez ustawy o prawach autorskich, które w innym przypadku mogłoby naruszać prawa autorskie.

fr-FR.title: J'AI BATTU LE PREMIER BOSS DANS PALWORLD AVEC JACK 😱
fr-FR.description:
Abonnez-vous pour ne manquer aucune vidéo !

🤗 Suivez-moi sur Instagram : https://www.instagram.com/gamerfleetog/

J'espère que vous avez apprécié la vidéo. Si c'est le cas, n'hésitez pas à la liker et à la partager.

Avertissement relatif au droit d'auteur : conformément à l'article 107 de la loi américaine sur le droit d'auteur de 1976, l'utilisation équitable est autorisée à des fins telles que la critique, le commentaire, le reportage, l'enseignement, l'érudition, l'éducation et la recherche.

L'utilisation équitable est une utilisation autorisée par la loi sur le droit d'auteur qui, autrement, pourrait constituer une contrefaçon.

Aviso de direitos autorais: De acordo com a seção 107 da Lei de Direitos Autorais de 1976, é permitido o "uso justo" para fins como crítica, comentário, reportagem, ensino, pesquisa e educação.

O uso justo é um uso permitido pelas leis de direitos autorais que, de outra forma, poderia ser considerado uma infração.

id.title: SAYA MENGALAHKAN BOS PERTAMA DI PALWORLD BERSAMA JACK 😱
id.description:
Silakan Berlangganan untuk Video Baru
🤗 Ikuti Saya di Instagram: ​https://www.instagram.com/gamerfleetog/ 

Semoga Anda menikmati video ini. Jika ya, silakan sukai & bagikan video ini.

Pernyataan Penafian Hak Cipta berdasarkan pasal 107 Undang-Undang Hak Cipta tahun 1976, izin diberikan untuk “penggunaan wajar” untuk tujuan seperti kritik, komentar, pelaporan berita, pengajaran, beasiswa, pendidikan, dan penelitian.

Penggunaan wajar adalah penggunaan yang diizinkan oleh undang-undang hak cipta yang mungkin dianggap melanggar hak cipta.

bn.title: আমি জ্যাকের সাথে পালওয়ার্ল্ড (Palworld)-এর প্রথম বসকে পরাজিত করেছি 😱
bn.description:
নতুন ভিডিওর জন্য অনুগ্রহ করে সাবস্ক্রাইব করুন
🤗 আমাকে ইনস্টাগ্রামে ফলো করুন: https://www.instagram.com/gamerfleetog/

আশা করি ভিডিওটি আপনাদের ভালো লেগেছে। যদি ভালো লেগে থাকে, তবে অনুগ্রহ করে ভিডিওটি লাইক ও শেয়ার করুন।

১৯৭৬ সালের কপিরাইট আইনের ১০৭ ধারা অনুযায়ী কপিরাইট দাবিত্যাগ, সমালোচনা, মন্তব্য, সংবাদ প্রতিবেদন, শিক্ষাদান, বৃত্তি, শিক্ষা এবং গবেষণার মতো উদ্দেশ্যে "ন্যায্য ব্যবহারের" অনুমতি দেওয়া হয়েছে।

ন্যায্য ব্যবহার হলো কপিরাইট আইন দ্বারা অনুমোদিত এমন একটি ব্যবহার যা অন্যথায় লঙ্ঘনকারী হতে পারে।

te.title: నేను JACKతో PALWORLDలో మొదటి బాస్‌ని ఓడించాను 😱
te.description:
కొత్త వీడియోల కోసం దయచేసి సబ్స్క్రైబ్ చేసుకోండి

🤗 నన్ను ఇన్‌స్టాగ్రామ్‌లో ఫాలో అవ్వండి: https://www.instagram.com/gamerfleetog/

మీకు ఈ వీడియో నచ్చిందని ఆశిస్తున్నాను, ఒకవేళ నచ్చితే, దయచేసి వీడియోను లైక్ చేసి, షేర్ చేయండి.

1976 కాపీరైట్ చట్టంలోని సెక్షన్ 107 ప్రకారం, విమర్శ, వ్యాఖ్యానం, వార్తా నివేదన, బోధన, పాండిత్యం, విద్య మరియు పరిశోధన వంటి ప్రయోజనాల కోసం "న్యాయమైన వినియోగం"కు అనుమతి ఇవ్వబడింది.

న్యాయమైన వినియోగం అనేది కాపీరైట్ చట్టాల ద్వారా అనుమతించబడిన ఒక వినియోగం, లేకపోతే అది ఉల్లంఘన కావచ్చు.

ml.title: JACK-നൊപ്പം PALWORLD-ലെ ആദ്യ ബോസിനെ ഞാൻ തോൽപ്പിച്ചു 😱
ml.description:
പുതിയ വീഡിയോകൾക്കായി സബ്‌സ്‌ക്രൈബുചെയ്യുക
🤗 ഇൻസ്റ്റാഗ്രാമിൽ എന്നെ പിന്തുടരുക: ​https://www.instagram.com/gamerfleetog/

വീഡിയോ ഇഷ്ടപ്പെട്ടെങ്കിൽ നിങ്ങൾ ഇഷ്ടപ്പെട്ടുവെന്ന് ഞാൻ പ്രതീക്ഷിക്കുന്നു, ദയവായി വീഡിയോ ലൈക്ക് ചെയ്‌ത് പങ്കിടുക. 

1976 ലെ പകർപ്പവകാശ നിയമത്തിലെ സെക്ഷൻ 107 പ്രകാരം, വിമർശനം, അഭിപ്രായം, വാർത്താ റിപ്പോർട്ടിംഗ്, അധ്യാപനം, സ്കോളർഷിപ്പ്, വിദ്യാഭ്യാസം, ഗവേഷണം തുടങ്ങിയ ആവശ്യങ്ങൾക്ക് "ന്യായമായ ഉപയോഗത്തിന്" അനുമതി നൽകിയിട്ടുണ്ട്.

പകർപ്പവകാശ നിയമങ്ങൾ അനുവദിക്കുന്ന ഒരു ഉപയോഗമാണ് ന്യായമായ ഉപയോഗം, അല്ലാത്തപക്ഷം അത് ലംഘിക്കപ്പെടാം.

ta.title: நான் JACK உடன் சேர்ந்து PALWORLD-இன் முதல் பாஸை தோற்கடித்துவிட்டேன் 😱
ta.description:
புதிய வீடியோக்களுக்கு சப்ஸ்கிரைப் செய்யுங்கள்
🤗 இன்ஸ்டாகிராமில் என்னைப் பின்தொடருங்கள்: https://www.instagram.com/gamerfleetog/

இந்த வீடியோ உங்களுக்குப் பிடித்திருக்கும் என்று நம்புகிறேன். பிடித்திருந்தால், தயவுசெய்து லைக் செய்து பகிருங்கள்.

1976 ஆம் ஆண்டின் பதிப்புரிமைச் சட்டத்தின் பிரிவு 107-இன் கீழ் பதிப்புரிமை மறுப்புரை: விமர்சனம், கருத்துரை, செய்தி அறிக்கை, கற்பித்தல், கல்விப் புலமை, கல்வி மற்றும் ஆராய்ச்சி போன்ற நோக்கங்களுக்காக "நியாயமான பயன்பாட்டிற்கு" அனுமதி வழங்கப்படுகிறது.

நியாயமான பயன்பாடு என்பது பதிப்புரிமைச் சட்டங்களால் அனுமதிக்கப்பட்ட ஒரு பயன்பாடாகும், இல்லையெனில் அது மீறலாகக் கருதப்படலாம்.

Добросовісне використання — це використання, дозволене законами про авторське право, яке в іншому випадку могло б бути порушенням.

pa.title: ਮੈਂ ਜੈਕ ਨਾਲ ਪਾਲਵਰਲਡ ਵਿੱਚ ਪਹਿਲੇ ਬੌਸ ਨੂੰ ਹਰਾਇਆ 😱
pa.description:
ਨਵੇਂ ਵੀਡੀਓਜ਼ ਲਈ ਕਿਰਪਾ ਕਰਕੇ ਸਬਸਕ੍ਰਾਈਬ ਕਰੋ
🤗 ਇੰਸਟਾਗ੍ਰਾਮ 'ਤੇ ਮੇਰਾ ਪਾਲਣ ਕਰੋ: ​https://www.instagram.com/gamerfleetog/ 

ਮੈਨੂੰ ਉਮੀਦ ਹੈ ਕਿ ਤੁਹਾਨੂੰ ਵੀਡੀਓ ਪਸੰਦ ਆਈ ਹੋਵੇਗੀ, ਜੇਕਰ ਤੁਹਾਨੂੰ ਪਸੰਦ ਆਈ ਹੈ, ਤਾਂ ਕਿਰਪਾ ਕਰਕੇ ਵੀਡੀਓ ਨੂੰ ਲਾਈਕ ਅਤੇ ਸ਼ੇਅਰ ਕਰੋ। 

ਕਾਪੀਰਾਈਟ ਅਸਵੀਕਾਰਨ 1976 ਦੇ ਕਾਪੀਰਾਈਟ ਐਕਟ ਦੀ ਧਾਰਾ 107 ਦੇ ਤਹਿਤ, ਆਲੋਚਨਾ, ਟਿੱਪਣੀ, ਖ਼ਬਰਾਂ ਦੀ ਰਿਪੋਰਟਿੰਗ, ਸਿੱਖਿਆ, ਸਕਾਲਰਸ਼ਿਪ, ਸਿੱਖਿਆ ਅਤੇ ਖੋਜ ਵਰਗੇ ਉਦੇਸ਼ਾਂ ਲਈ "ਨਿਰਪੱਖ ਵਰਤੋਂ" ਦੀ ਆਗਿਆ ਹੈ।

ਨਿਰਪੱਖ ਵਰਤੋਂ ਕਾਪੀਰਾਈਟ ਕਾਨੂੰਨਾਂ ਦੁਆਰਾ ਆਗਿਆ ਪ੍ਰਾਪਤ ਵਰਤੋਂ ਹੈ ਜੋ ਹੋਰ ਉਲੰਘਣਾ ਕਰ ਸਕਦੀ ਹੈ।

iw.title: הבסתי את הבוס הראשון ב-Palworld עם ג'ק 😱
iw.description:
אנא הירשמו לסרטונים חדשים
🤗 עקבו אחריי באינסטגרם: https://www.instagram.com/gamerfleetog/

אני מקווה שנהניתם מהסרטון, אם כן, אנא עשו לייק ושתפו את הסרטון.

הצהרת זכויות יוצרים תחת סעיף 107 לחוק זכויות היוצרים משנת 1976, מתירה "שימוש הוגן" למטרות כגון ביקורת, תגובות, דיווח חדשותי, הוראה, מלגות, חינוך ומחקר.

שימוש הוגן הוא שימוש המותר על פי חוקי זכויות יוצרים שאחרת עלול להוות הפרה.

💔 प्यार, दर्द और टूटे हुए अरमानों की एक भावुक कहानी लेकर आ रहा है नया मैथिली सैड सॉन्ग "गरीब के दिल"। इस गीत में एक गरीब दिल की बेबसी, सच्चे प्यार की तड़प और जुदाई का दर्द सुनने को मिलेगा। अगर आप दर्द भरे मैथिली गाने पसंद करते हैं, तो यह गीत आपके दिल को जरूर छू जाएगा। ❤️‍🩹

snippet.title: SADI SUN - Elvish Yadav & Simrat Kaur Randhawa | Harsh Nussi | Anshul Garg
snippet.description:
Anshul Garg presents Sadi Sun featuring Elvish Yadav & Simrat Kaur Randhawa.

Audio Credits :-
Singer : Harsh Nussi 
Lyrics & Composer : Harsh Nussi x Deep Klair
Music : Harsh Nussi
Guitar : Sachin Sheriya
Engineered by : Hiten
Mix assistant : Jones
Female Model : Heena Mahey
Music Director : Sixthfebb & Kkd45
Editing by : Sixthfebb

Video Credits :-
Director : Satti Dhillon
Production house : RS Films and Production
Executive Producer : Rahul Sehal
Associate Director : Rajat Yadav 
Dop : Vikcee
Dop Ac : Rahul
Dop Ac : Rashwinder
VFX : Gagan Matharoo
Choreographer : John
Production managar : Rohit gaur,saksham mehta,gulshan, Jaadu
Production Assistant : Gurpreet Singh, Amarjeet,badal
Jimmy jib operator : Gaurav 
Steady cam : HMC
Artist Hmu : Harry Bajwa
Artist costume : Rajat Manchanda 
Extra hmu : Sunny 
Production Design : Framecraft Film 
Art director : Suraj
Editor : Mr Editor 
Colourist : Onkar
Bts : Theharshphotographer
Junior casting : Aamir

PlayDMF Team :-
Founder & CEO : Anshul Garg  
Vice President : Raghav Sharma ( Pratick Sharma)
Label Manager : Sankalp Garg
Project Head : Gaurav Arora
Legal & Digital Manager : Ashima Chauhan
PlayDMF Team : Anshu Prasad & Samrat Tyagi
Artwork : Vicky Sandhu
Accounts Manager : Sanjay Sharma & Rajkummar Jha
Legal Asst : Maninder Kaur
Special Thanks : Virgin Music India

https://www.virginmusic.com/

Virgin Music India Team :-
Head : Amit Sharma 
Team : Nagesh Jadhav, Kajal Israni, Amol Suryavanshi, Krupa Munvar, Lavanya Dass & Nishtha Sikroria

Associated Brands :- 
DSG Investments Pvt. Ltd. (https://www.dsginvestments.com)
UPES University (https://www.upes.ac.in/)
Optima Insurance Brokers Private Limited (https://optima.co.in/)

Travel and Hospitality Partner : PRM Hospitality

Lyrics :-
Chup kar lang jaave kol di tu sang jaave
Ikko takkni ch tere rang vich rang jaave
Loki kehnde kithe jaayiye par asi khiche aayie
Kol di jado tu shanka ke saade vang jaave

Duniya di fikar bhula te sahi
Ki sochein saade baare samjha te sahi
Baaki sab tere baare puchi bethe aa 
Dil apne da dass raah te sahi

Akhiyan nal akhiyan mila te sahi
Sadi sun apni suna te sahi
Sade naal dil jeha laa te sahi
Saadi hoja sanu apna bna te sahi x2

Je puchdi aa keho jehe aa,shad de ni eho jehe aa 
Tere hone chaunde aa ni, Paavien asi jeho jehe aa
Dekh azma ke kude, apna bna ke kude
Tere bina hai ni koi, kehnde aa sounh khake kude

Sade naal thoda hass laa te sahi, naagan jyi bann dass laa te sahi
Banja tu raani kude saade dil di, deep deep aakh ke bula te sahi

Akhiyan nal akhiyan mila te sahi
Sadi sun apni suna te sahi
Sade naal dil jeha laa te sahi
Saadi hoja sanu apna bna te sahi

Tenu pouna zidd dil di, mai v vekhda kidda ni mildi
Hor sohniya boht jag te, par tetho ni nigaah meri hildi
Oo kade na kade taa sade taakre, asi bewajah ni tere piche khabre
Billo sachiya preeta pouna chounde aa, aevien khaali feelinga ni kude chakk rahe

Sanu khush jeha rehna tu sikha te sahi
Mukkdi aa gall koi muka te sahi
Baaki diyan gallan aapa fer krange
Pehla ishq paheli samjha te sahi

Akhiyan nal akhiyan mila te sahi
Sadi sun apni suna te sahi
Sade naal dil jeha laa te sahi
Saadi hoja sanu apna bna te sahi

#sadisun #elvishyadav #simrattkaur #harshnussi #harshnussi

Chup kar lang jaave kol di tu sang jaave
Ikko takkni ch tere rang vich rang jaave
Loki kehnde kithe jaayiye par asi khiche aayie
Kol di jado tu shanka ke saade vang jaave

Duniya di fikar bhula te sahi
Ki sochein saade baare samjha te sahi
Baaki sab tere baare puchi bethe aa 
Dil apne da dass raah te sahi

Akhiyan nal akhiyan mila te sahi
Sadi sun apni suna te sahi
Sade naal dil jeha laa te sahi
Saadi hoja sanu apna bna te sahi x2

Je puchdi aa keho jehe aa,shad de ni eho jehe aa 
Tere hone chaunde aa ni, Paavien asi jeho jehe aa
Dekh azma ke kude, apna bna ke kude
Tere bina hai ni koi, kehnde aa sounh khake kude

Sade naal thoda hass laa te sahi, naagan jyi bann dass laa te sahi
Banja tu raani kude saade dil di, deep deep aakh ke bula te sahi

Akhiyan nal akhiyan mila te sahi
Sadi sun apni suna te sahi
Sade naal dil jeha laa te sahi
Saadi hoja sanu apna bna te sahi

Tenu pouna zidd dil di, mai v vekhda kidda ni mildi
Hor sohniya boht jag te, par tetho ni nigaah meri hildi
Oo kade na kade taa sade taakre, asi bewajah ni tere piche khabre
Billo sachiya preeta pouna chounde aa, aevien khaali feelinga ni kude chakk rahe

Sanu khush jeha rehna tu sikha te sahi
Mukkdi aa gall koi muka te sahi
Baaki diyan gallan aapa fer krange
Pehla ishq paheli samjha te sahi

Akhiyan nal akhiyan mila te sahi
Sadi sun apni suna te sahi
Sade naal dil jeha laa te sahi
Saadi hoja sanu apna bna te sahi

snippet.title: [EN] 2026 PMGO S1 Main Event | Grand Finals | Day 1 | PUBG MOBILE GLOBAL OPEN Season 1
snippet.description:
The 2026 PUBG MOBILE GLOBAL OPEN Season 1 Main Event reaches its peak with the Grand Finals. 1,000,000+ players across the globe wanted to be on this stage. Only a handful of them have shown they are more skillful than the rest. 16 teams, two days, one champion. Every squad on that roster has earned their seat the hard way. No soft paths, no charity. Just the best of the best fighting for the right to call themselves champions.

🏆 2026 PUBG MOBILE GLOBAL OPEN Season 1 | Main Event

📋 FORMAT

Group Stage :
• 32 teams split into 2 groups of 16
• 2 days total (1 day per group)
• Overall Ranking 1–6 → Grand Finals
• Overall Ranking 7–14 → Survival Stage
• Overall Ranking 15–16 → Eliminated

Survival Stage : 
• Overall Ranking 1–4 → Grand Finals
• Overall Ranking 5–16 → Eliminated

Grand Finals (SMASH Rule)
• 16 teams — 2 days, 6 matches per day

🔥 SMASH RULE ( On Day 2) 
SMASH Rule is the most exciting way to claim the trophy but how do you do it? Here is how : 

Day 1 Overall Ranking #1 team's points +10 = Match Point Threshold.
Hit the threshold on Day 2, then win another match to claim the title.
No SMASH? Highest total points wins under standard overall ranking.

🗓 Tournament Schedule: 

Group Stage: June 2–3
Survival Stage: June 4
Grand Finals: June 6–7

Try PUBG MOBILE now:  https://pubgmobile.go.link/26pmgo
💰Total Prize Pool: $500,000

• 2 days total (1 day per group)
• Overall Ranking 1–6 → Grand Finals
• Overall Ranking 7–14 → Survival Stage
• Overall Ranking 15–16 → Eliminated

• Overall Ranking 1–4 → Grand Finals

Day 1 Overall Ranking #1 team's points +10 = Match Point Threshold.
Hit the threshold on Day 2, then win another match to claim the title.
No SMASH? Highest total points wins under standard overall ranking.

snippet.title: Olivia Rodrigo - stupid song (Official Music Video)
snippet.description:
Listen to 'you seem pretty sad for a girl so in love' out now: https://OliviaRodrigo.lnk.to/girlsoinlove

Lyrics

New York City’s never looked so blue
My friends are smoking blunts in the bathroom
They say that honest love
Is a cage that makes you feel free
And all the girls at this party are so cool
That’s never been a thing that I could do
But I can’t help but imagine
What you say when you speak with me

You’re a spark in the dark
And my clothes all caught aflame
You should feel how I feel
When somebody says your name
I’m a car speeding down
The boulevard without a brake
And I want you more than
Any stupid song could ever say
I’m a heart made of wax
And I’m melting in the sun
I’m a thread on your shirt
That is coming undone
I feel right, I feel wrong
I feel totally insane
And I want you more than
Any stupid song could ever say

Walking through the park with my head high
Past all the college girls and the drunk guys
And if there is a God
He’s the bond that’s between us two
Seven nights alone and a skipped meal
I’m sleeping in my dress and my high heels
And I’m too shy to say what I see
When I dream of you
When I dream of you

You’re a spark in the dark
And my clothes all caught aflame
You should feel how I feel
When somebody says your name
I’m a car speeding down
The boulevard without a brake
And I want you more than
Any stupid song could ever say
I’m a heart made of wax
And I’m melting in the sun
I’m a thread on your shirt
That is coming undone
I feel right, I feel wrong
I feel totally insane
And I want you more than
Any stupid song could ever say

Every night like the one before
Dream of you from like 1 to 4
Positively and truly sure
Nobody’s wanted somebody more
It’s a thing that I can’t ignore
Tell your friends that you’re mine
I’m yours
With the hand on my heart I swore
Nobody’s wanted somebody more
It’s a thing that I can’t ignore
Tell your friends that you’re mine
I’m yours
With a hand on my heart I swore

I’m going crazy
I’m going mad
I want you baby so bad

Any stupid song could ever say

Follow Ekdev through Chitwan as he experiences love, romance, and adventure in the most carefree way. Where reality and dreams merge into moments that change everything.
